title: Junior Systems Administrator (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a proactive Junior Systems Administrator to help manage and maintain the IT infrastructure and business applications for our diverse group of clients. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring that our clients' systems are secure, up-to-date, and performing optimally.

 

This is a dynamic MSP role where no two days are the same. You will move between different client environments, gaining hands-on experience managing various cloud setups, security protocols, and enterprise software. This is a perfect role for someone who wants to move beyond basic helpdesk support and into multi-tenant systems management.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Client System Administration

   - Assist in the administration of core business platforms for clients (e.g., Microsoft 365, Entra ID/Active Directory, and CRM systems).

  - Monitor client system health, performance, and security logs to identify and resolve potential issues proactively.

  - Manage user onboarding/offboarding, permissions, and access levels across various client software platforms.

*Security & Compliance Management

  - Help implement and enforce security best practices for clients, including MFA, password policies, and endpoint protection.

  - Assist with software patching, updates, and system backups to ensure client data integrity and business continuity.

  - Participate in basic security audits and help document compliance procedures for client environments.

*Infrastructure & Network Support

  - Support the configuration and maintenance of client network devices (firewalls, switches, and Wi-Fi access points).

  - Assist in managing client cloud infrastructure and virtual environments.

  - Troubleshoot hardware and software issues escalated from the general support level.

*Documentation & Client Communication

  - Maintain accurate records of client system configurations, hardware inventory, and software licenses.

  - Create and update "How-To" guides and technical documentation for client users and internal tea
mbers.

  - Provide clear, professional updates to clients regarding the status of their systems and projects.



Qualifications (Required)

*Technical Foundation: 0–3 years of experience in IT support or a related technical role (MSP experience is a major plus).

*Operating Systems: Strong familiarity with Windows 10/11 and a basic understanding of Windows Server.

*Cloud Basics: General knowledge of Microsoft 365 administration (users, groups, and licenses).

*Networking Knowledge: Understanding of basic networking concepts (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPNs).

*API Awareness: Basic understanding of how APIs work and comfort navigating technical documentation.

*Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a strong customer-service mindset.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

*Experience with virtualization (Hyper-V, VMware) or cloud platforms (Azure, AWS).

*Familiarity with security tools (Antivirus, Firewalls, MDM solutions).

*Any IT certifications (CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft Fundamentals).



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (1989) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



This is an overnight position. The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Remote Education Sales Closer (Warm Leads – Performance Bonuses)
description:
Full-Time | Remote | Australian Company



Erudite Tuition is an Australian-based private tutoring company supporting students from Kindergarten to Year 12 across English, Mathematics, and Science. We receive a consistent flow of warm parent enquiries from families actively seeking tutoring support.



We are hiring a full-time remote Sales Closer to handle approximately 300 warm leads per month. This role is focused on converting parent enquiries into long-term tutoring students through structured consultation, objection handling, and persistent follow-up. This is a performance-driven sales position with a transparent bonus structure tied to clear KPIs and you will be expected to respond quickly to new leads and maintain disciplined follow-up until a decision is reached.



What you will do:

    - Call warm parent enquiries (Australia-based clients)

    - Conduct structured needs assessments to understand student goals

    - Clearly explain our tutoring model and recommend appropriate solutions

    - Handle objections confidently (pricing, timing, hesitation)

    - Follow up consistently via phone, SMS,
, and messaging

    - Maintain accurate CRM pipeline records

    - Coordinate with operations to ensure smooth student onboarding

    - Work toward clear monthly conversion KPIs

    - This role requires persistence and confidence. You must be confident in making outbound calls and handling objections.



Performance Expectations

    - Roughly 300 warm leads per month

    - Daily outbound calls required

    - Target conversion rate: 12–18%

    - Minimum 4 follow-ups per qualified lead

    - Strong CRM hygiene and documentation



Compensation (AUD)

    - Base pay $7.50 per hour

    - Performance bonuses:

             $30 flat bonus when a student reaches 4 completed lessons

             $1.50 per completed lesson (up to 12 lessons per student)

    - Sales staff who meet a 15% conversion rate can expect to earn $2600 per month.

    - This is a stable, full-time role with clear earning upside tied directly to your performance.



Requirements

    - Minimum 1 year of phone-based sales experience

    - Clear, neutral English accent

    - Comfortable speaking with Australian parents

    - Proven ability to hit sales KPIs

    - Strong objection handling skills

    - Highly organised and detail-oriented

    - Reliable high-speed internet and quiet work environment

    - Available to work Australian business hours



Application Process

All applications must include:

    - Resume

    - 2-minute video introduction including:

              * A short mock pitch explaining tutoring to a hesitant parent

              * An example of how you handle an objection such as “It’s too expensive”



Applications without a resume and video will not be considered.

title: Rhino Expert
description:
Where Craft Meets Precision | Design That Gets Built



Are you someone who finds deep satisfaction in creating designs that don't just look beautiful, but actually work in the real world? Do you light up when you see your technical drawings transform into finished furniture pieces? We're looking for a detail-oriented 3D Furniture Design Specialist who understands that great design serves the craftspeople who bring it to life.



This isn't about creating concepts that sit in a portfolio. It's about producing technical plans that carpenters and manufacturers trust, execute, and turn into furniture that lasts.



Your Core Responsibilities:

– Create detailed 3D models and technical drawings for custom furniture and cabinetry

– Develop production-ready plans that translate seamlessly to the workshop floor

– Work across diverse projects including woodwork and metalwork

– Ensure every design is practical, precise, and optimized for manufacturing

– Collaborate remotely with craftsmen to deliver exceptional results



We're Looking for Someone Who:

– Has a strong portfolio proving furniture design and production experience (this is essential)

– Masters professional 3D software like Rhino or SolidWorks

– Truly understands furniture manufacturing - the tools, processes, and constraints

– Comes from product design, engineering, or industrial design (not just architecture)

– Takes pride in creating designs that are buildable, not just beautiful

– Works independently with discipline and attention to detail



Bonus Points For:

– Deep experience with Rhino software

– Proficiency in SolidWorks

– Hands-on knowledge of carpentry and furniture manufacturing

– Product engineering or industrial design background



Why This Role Matters:

The difference between a good design and a great design often comes down to understanding how it will actually be made. You'll play a critical role in bridging vision and execution—creating plans that craftspeople can trust and clients will love.



Why You'll Love Working Here:

– Your work has direct impact - designs that become real furniture

– Work remotely with the freedom to focus on quality

– Collaborate with skilled craftsmen who value precision

– Build your expertise across diverse custom furniture projects



Ready to create designs that matter?

Apply now with your portfolio and let's build something meaningful together.

mber misses deadlines repeatedly. What do you do?

title: Lead Generation & Data Scraping Specialist
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Data Specialist to build and maintain a high-intent prospecting pipeline. Your primary responsibility is to identify companies currently scaling on Meta Ads, pinpoint the decision-makers, and aggregate their verified contact data into a centralized tracking system. This is a technical research role requiring high proficiency in ad transparency tools and B2B databases.



Key Responsibilities

Ad Library Mining: Monitor the Meta Ad Library to identify active advertisers based on specific niche criteria and "Creative Count" (identifying who is scaling vs. testing).



Decision Maker Identification: Use 
, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and other intelligence tools to find the specific individuals (Founders, CEOs, Ops Directors) responsible for the business.



Data Enrichment & Verification: Extract and verify direct business
s and LinkedIn profiles.



Data Integrity: Maintain a "Master Sheet" with 100?curacy, ensuring no duplicates and zero-bounce
 data.



The "Master Sheet" Architecture

You will be responsible for populating the following data points for every lead:



Company Intelligence: Name, Website, Niche, and Estimated Headcount.



Ad Signal: Link to their active Meta Ad Library, number of active ads, and "Launch Date" of their most recent campaign.



The Person: Full Name, Exact Title, and LinkedIn Profile URL.



Contact Data: Verified Business
 (must pass a 3rd-party verification check).



Contextual Hook: A brief note on what their current ads are offering (e.g., "Free Masterclass" or "Book a Discovery Call") so the sales team knows the "Why."



Requirements

Advanced Tool Knowledge: Expert-level use of 
, Meta Ad Library, and Google Sheets (must be comfortable with deduplication and data cleaning).



Scraping Logic: Ability to find "hidden" contact info when standard database searches fail.



Accuracy: A "zero-error" mindset. If the data is wrong, the outreach fails.



Consistency: Ability to hit daily lead quotas without a drop in data quality.



How to Apply

To be considered, please reply with:



A brief description of your workflow for finding a CEO’s
 starting from a Meta Ad.



A list of the data verification tools you use to ensure
s don't bounce.



The word "SHIELD" at the very beginning of your application.

title: Linkedin Community Manager
description:
Job Overview:

As a 
munity Manager, you will be pivotal in creating, curating, and sharing engaging content, managing a strong LinkedIn presence, and driving active interaction within our online community. This full-time position comes with standard working hours. If you're looking to enhance your content creation and community management skills, this role is ideal for you. We have two positions available, so you can choose the one that best fits your skills and interests.



Key Responsibilities:

-Stay updated on the latest AI news and trends.

-Assist in creating LinkedIn content, including writing captions and brainstorming video ideas.

-Publish consistent content on Substack, adhering to a regular posting schedule.

-Engage with the 
munity by responding to comments on posts.

-Manage the Substack content calendar, repurposing LinkedIn posts and interacting with subscribers.

-Design single-image content and occasional carousels for LinkedIn.

-Track AI and other relevant trends, integrating them into our content strategy.



Required Skills:

-Content Creation: Proven experience in content creation, particularly on LinkedIn (preferred).

-Communication: Strong writing skills with an engaging and clear style.

-Social Media Expertise: Familiarity with LinkedIn’s platform and best practices.

-Quick Learner: Passion for staying updated on trends in content creation and AI.

-Time Management: Capable of managing multiple tasks and meeting deadlines.

-Work Ethic: Self-motivated, proactive, and enthusiastic.



Preferred Skills:

-Experience creating LinkedIn content, including captions and single-image posts.

-Knowledge of AI trends and the ability to create relevant content.

-Ability to work independently and take initiative.

-Experience with Substack and content repurposing strategies.

-Basic graphic design skills (e.g., Canva, Photoshop).



Why Join Us:

Joining our team offers an exciting opportunity to grow professionally in a creative and dynamic environment, where content creation and community management are at the core of what we do. You'll be part of a flexible, remote team that values continuous learning, innovation, and collaboration. This is a place where you can make a meaningful impact and thrive in your career.

title: E-commerce Product Specialist
description:
We operate three established and profitable e-commerce stores and are expanding our team to support growth and product excellence. We’re looking for an experienced, detail-oriented E-commerce Product Specialist who can manage product listings, perform web scraping, and help optimize our Shopify stores.



This is a senior-level role with long-term potential for the right candidate. PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION AND ANSWER ALL QUESTIONS FOR YOUR APPLICATION TO BE CONSIDERED.



Responsibilities -

• Manage and maintain product information across all stores: uploading new products, updating listings, and maintaining vendor databases.

• Coordinate with vendors to gather accurate product information, lead times, and order details.

• Research products and competitors to identify new opportunities and monitor performance metrics.

• Optimize Shopify listings for product rankings, conversion rates, and sales growth.

• Perform mass uploads and bulk changes to products efficiently.

• Quality-check product images, titles, descriptions, and specifications for accuracy.

• Collaborate with the team to resolve product and website issues promptly.

• Oversee inventory reconciliation and track stock levels.

• Document SOPs, maintain records of product performance, and suggest process improvements.

• Complete daily administrative tasks, including reports, logs, and operational updates.

• Manage assigned tasks proactively and independently, without needing follow-ups or reminders.



What You Need to Succeed -



Required Experience:

• 2+ years of Product Management or Product Specialist experience in an e-commerce environment.

• Proven hands-on experience with Shopify (being Shopify Certified is a plus).

• Strong attention to detail (include the word mushroom in your application).

• Comfortable handling multiple priorities in a fast-moving environment.



Technical Requirements:

• Proficiency with Shopify, ClickUp, Airtable, Google Workspace, and web scraping tools.

• Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills.

• A reliable computer and at least 20 Mbps internet connection.

• Backup solutions for both power and internet outages.



Work Style:

• Self-directed: takes initiative, owns tasks, and solves problems independently.

• Process-minded: documents and refines workflows naturally.

• Detail-oriented: accuracy is a priority.

• Customer-focused: product issues and feedback are opportunities to improve systems.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time, 40 hours/week

• US business hours: 9 PM–6 AM or 10 PM–7 AM PHT

• 1-hour break

• Five days per week



This Role Won’t Be a Match If:

• You need micromanagement or detailed daily task lists.

• You cannot work 9 PM–7 AM PHT consistently.

• You experience frequent power/internet outages without backup solutions.

• You view this as temporary income between other opportunities.



Before You Apply – Please Confirm:

• Weekly payments for the first 4 weeks (starting from week 3), then bi-monthly every other Tuesday.

• Full-time role, US hours.

• Must be open to a one-month trial period.

• Daily End of Shift (EOS) report answering:

  a) What did you do today? (detailed description)

  b) What issues did you run into?

  c) Anything you need help with?



If you agree to all terms, write “I AGREE TO ALL TERMS” and answer the questions below.

Application Instructions (Follow Exactly)

Subject Line:

[Your First Name] – I Am Your Product Specialist

Example: Kevin – I Am Your Product Specialist



Submit:

• Cover letter (focused on relevant e-commerce experience)

• Resume



Answer These Questions (Complete Sentences Required):

• What is your previous experience with managing products for e-commerce companies?

• List the tools/software you’ve used for product management, including web scraping, bulk uploads, or analytics, and explain how you applied them.

• Have you worked with Shopify before? Please describe your tasks.

• Are you currently engaged in another job or commitment?

• How fast is your internet (include a screenshot)?

• Do you have a reliable computer? Please share specs.

• How often do you experience power or internet outages?

• What backup solutions do you have for power outages?

• What backup solutions do you have for internet outages?



Important: AI-generated or template responses will be immediately disqualified. We are looking for thoughtful, specific answers that demonstrate you read and understood this posting.

title: Legal Relationship & Pipeline Virtual Assistant
description:
We are seeking a proactive, intuitive, and highly organized Virtual Assistant with legal experience to manage relationship follow-ups, pipeline tracking, scheduling coordination, and CRM management.

This is not a rigid call-center role. It requires collaboration with the attorney, judgment in communication, and the ability to move opportunities forward naturally — often via text,
, or CR
ssaging.



The goal is simple:

Ensure no ticket, referral, or relationship falls through the cracks — and increase booked consultations and retained clients.



Core Responsibilities

1. Relationship & Follow-Up Campaign Management

* Follow up with referral partners, prospects, and prior contacts

* Send professional texts or
s such as: “Yes, I’ll have the attorney call you — what time works best?”

* Use discretion and communication intuition when engaging contacts

* Collaborate with the attorney on tone and outreach strategy

* Track follow-up cadence (less rigid, more strategic)



2. Scheduling Coordination (Part-Time Focus)

* Coordinate consultation scheduling between prospects and attorney

* Confirm appointments

* Ensure intake information is complete prior to consultation

* Not a full-time scheduling desk — targeted and strategic booking



3. Ticket & Case Stage Monitoring

* Monitor tickets and matters inside the system

* Check case stages in Clio and other platforms

* Identify matters “waiting to hit” or stalled

* Flag items requiring attorney attention

* Move cases forward by prompting next steps



4. CRM & System Management

* Maintain accurate pipeline tracking in Clio (CRM)

* Monitor lead ? consultation ? retained ? active case progression

* Set reminders and follow-up tasks

* Ensure tasks are prioritized properly

* Clean up and organize CRM data



5. Task Prioritization & Workflow Support

* Review daily and weekly task lists

* Identify high-priority revenue-driving actions

* Ensure timely follow-ups

* Reduce attorney administrative load



Technology Requirements:

* Experience with Clio (strongly preferred)

* CRM management experience

* Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Calendar)

* Microsoft Office familiarity

* Comfortable learning legal tech platforms



Qualifications: 

* Prior experience working in a law firm or legal support role

* Strong written and verbal communication skills

* Comfortable sending professional texts and
s

* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Ability to exercise judgment and discretion

* Understanding of legal confidentiality standards



To fast track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."

title: Video Ad Editor (Direct Response) for Evervive + other stores
description:
We’re looking for a Video Editor and Graphic Designer to help us produce direct response video ads and simple design assets for our e-commerce brands. The main skill we care about is your ability to take reference ads, recreate the style, then make variations so we can test more angles.



We are Evervive, a home goods brand focused on home care and restoration. We also operate multiple online stores and plan to scale creative output across more brands over time, so this can become long-term ongoing work with increasing volume if it’s a good fit.



This is part-time to start at 10 to 15 hours per week. Pay is $10 to $15 per hour depending on speed and quality. Hours can increase over time as we expand work across our stores.



You will edit short-form ads for paid social, mainly 9:16, sometimes 1:1 and 4:5. You should be able to match competitor or reference ads in pacing, captions, and structure while keeping everything Evervive-branded. You will create variations from a base edit with new hooks, new first 3 seconds, and different CTAs. You will also make simple graphics when needed like end cards, badges, frames, and product callouts. We want you to use AI tools where helpful and keep improving your AI workflow over time so our production stays modern.



We need someone with a portfolio showing direct response or social ad edits that are similar in style. You can use any solid editing software you prefer. Clear communication and consistent delivery matter. AI experience is required and willingness to keep learning is required.



For the interview, we’ll start with a very small test edit, about a 10-minute task, so we can see your style match and workflow. We’ll provide a reference ad style and a Drive folder with assets. You will deliver 1 UGC style edit for our product, Evervive Leather & Wood Restoring Salve.



Disclaimer: This test is only to showcase your abilities. We are not using your work commercially unless we agree to move forward and hire you.



Inspiration sources

Evervive Ad Library: 



Competitor 1: 



Competitor 2: 



Available content

Our Content folder: 



Submission guidelines

Submit your video as a high-resolution MP4 or MOV file directly in messages as an attachment.



How to apply

Send your application through the platform with links to 2 to 3 ads you have edited that match this style, tell us what editing software you use, tell us which AI tools you use, and tell us your hourly rate and weekly availability.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
SEO Specialist



Y1 Sport are looking for someone with strong experience doing SEO to improve our rankings. To apply for this role you must fully understand how to improve our SEO and we would like you to demonstrate in an interview how you would improve our current website.



We have two websites that need a lot of focus and we would like you do some research on them to show that you have the skills for the role.




 - our primary focus is the field hockey market. We also have a large club teamwear department. We have also launched Y1 Padel. Padel is the fastest growing sport in the world an area of big focus for us in 2025.




 - our custom clothing brand. We make custom garments for sports clubs and societies. Our popular products are custom quarter zips, hoodies, gilets, boonies etc. We have only launched this website in the last 6 months.



We are a UK based sports startup company, we have 12 employees in the UK and 12 in the Philippines.



Role:

- To do a full audit on our websites and come up with a strategy to increase our rankings for specific key search terms

- Weekly improvements to the website and regular blog posts

- Weekly reporting to the team on the changes being made and the impact on website traffic / results from organic

- Educating our team on how to improve SEO

- A/B testing - testing different techniques and measuring results



We are looking for someone incredibly proactive to take the lead and help our business with their expertise.



Start Date will be on Jan 1st April.

title: Proposal Manager (GovCon Experience Only)
description:
Proposal Manager (GovCon Experience Required)



Company: Servexo

Employment Type: Full-Time | Remote

Schedule: Monday – Friday | 7:00 AM – 3:30 PM PST



Servexo is seeking an experienced Proposal Manager with proven Government Contracting

(GovCon) expertise to lead the full federal proposal lifecycle — from pre-RFP preparation

through final submission. This role is responsible for ensuring compliance, quality, organization,

and on-time delivery of competitive federal proposals.



GovCon proposal experience is required.

Key Responsibilities



• Lead end-to-end proposal development for federal solicitations (RFPs, RFQs, RFIs)

• Develop and manage compliance matrices and gap analysis templates to ensure full

alignment with solicitation requirements

• Maintain and continuously update the Past Performance Library

• Build and manage detailed proposal schedules and internal deadlines

• Coordinate and facilitate structured Color Team Reviews (Pink, Red, Gold, etc.)

• Write, edit, and refine proposal content for clarity, compliance, and persuasiveness

• Conduct structured review cycles and incorporate executive leadership feedback

• Ensure all submissions meet FAR and federal acquisition compliance standards

• Deliver final proposal drafts to leadership for review and approval

• Manage cross-functional coordination across operations, HR, finance, and executive

teams



Qualifications

• 3+ years of experience managing federal government proposals

• Strong knowledge of FAR and federal acquisition requirements

• Proven experience leading structured Color Team Review processes

• Excellent writing, editing, and document management skills

• Ability to manage multiple proposals and deadlines in a fast-paced GovCon environment

• Highly organized, detail-oriented, and process-driven



About Servexo

Servexo is a growing government contractor focused on operational excellence, compliance, and

high-quality service delivery. We are seeking a proposal professional who can take ownership of

the proposal function and drive competitive, compliant, and strategic submissions.

title: Video Editor for eCommerce ads
description:
Experienced Video Editor (Adobe Premiere Pro)



Do you want to be a part of our video team growth journey? Send us a message!



About Our 5+ Year Old Company

We are not like most companies. We focus heavily on video advertisement, and that’s why 30% out of the 20 employees in the company work solely with video. In this in-house position, you’ll be a part of a video editing team that is obsessed with telling stories that drive real results. As the competition in the e-commerce beauty industry is hard, our videos must stand out.



Role Overview

As a part of our video editing team, you’ll work closely with the team lead and the other video editors, to make storytelling video advertisements. The videos are mainly for paid ads on Instagram,
 and 
, and you’ll get rapid feedback daily on your progress.



Your Responsibilities

Enhance the storytelling by adding music, sound effects, pacing and transitions

When it boosts the storytelling, utilize AI to improve essential parts of the story

Create multiple attention-grabbing hooks that gets the viewer on the hook

title: Customer Support Expert
description:
We’re looking for hungry, motivated, and hardworking individuals to join our team as Customer Support Representatives and 
 Moderators. If you can communicate confidently in English and enjoy interacting with people from around the world—especially the U.S.—we want to hear from you.





Who We Are

We’re a 3-year-old customer support company dedicated to giving our clients the best customer experience possible. We help businesses grow by handling their customer interactions, converting leads, and providing reliable, high-quality support.





What We’re Looking For

We want tea
mbers who are excited to learn, grow, and perform at a high level. You’re a great fit if you have:

- A willingness to be trained and coached

- Strong English communication skills (especially in chat)

- A laptop/PC with a reliable internet connection and a backup option

- Fast and stable internet (required for workflow)

- The ability to respond quickly when contacted

- Basic sales or persuasion skills to help convert customers

- Emotional intelligence when dealing with client concerns

- Strong work ethic, reliability, and professionalism





Job Responsibilities

As part of our team, you will:

- Communicate with customers on behalf of our clients to ensure a smooth and positive experience

- Handle inquiries, assist with concerns, and support customers effectively

- Provide sales pitches or conversion strategies to encourage customers to invest in our client’s services

- Clock in/out and begin working as scheduled

- Represent our clients with professionalism and care





Work Schedule (PH Time)

Operations are conducted under the following shifts:

- Shift 1: 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM

- Shift 2: 9:00 PM – 7:00 AM







Compensation

- Starting Rate: $1.50 per hour

- Commissions: 3% sales commission (with potential to grow your base rate up to $4/hour depending on performance)





Performance Bonuses: 

Awarded every cut-off based on overall account performance, adherence to company systems, and quality of execution.

Bonuses are structured to reward:

- Strong conversion performance

- Proper upselling and session stacking

- Consistent application of company messaging systems

- Discipline in following friction timing guidelines

- Overall team collaboration and reliability

Bonus eligibility is determined based on measurable performance metrics and manager evaluation.



Low Performance: 8% commission rate only for poor results



We reward hard work, quality performance, and consistent improvement.



How to Apply

Send your application and include “STELLAR SUPPORT” & preferred work schedule in your subject line.

We’re looking for people who want to grow with us—if that’s you, we’d love to meet you!

title: Motion Graphics Designer
description:
Job Overview

We are looking for a 3D Motion Designer Virtual Assistant to support creative production teams with non-billable design tasks related to events, venues, and digital installations. The role will primarily involve creating short animations, motion assets, and visual content that elevate live events, LED displays, and venue presentations. You will work closely with internal designers and managers to produce motion graphics that align with established creative standards and project guidelines.



Key Responsibilities

-Design and animate short motion graphics for LED walls, event visuals, and presentations.

-Assist internal design teams with non-billable creative production tasks.

-Animate pre-existing design assets for live event environments.

-Help create visual mockups, concept animations, and design explorations.

-Revise designs according to internal feedback and project requirements.

-Organize and manage motion files, versions, and exports.

-Collaborate with designers and project teams during overlapping work hours.



Required Skills

-Proven experience as a Motion Designer or Motion Graphics Artist.

-Strong proficiency in Adobe After Effects.

-Experience with Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop.

-Solid understanding of animation principles, timing, and visual storytelling.

-Ability to follow brand guidelines and creative direction.

-Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely.



Preferred Skills

-Experience with Adobe Premiere Pro.

-Familiarity with Cinema 4D.

-Background in supporting event, experiential, or live production design.

-Collaborative mindset, able to work with multiple stakeholders.

-Familiarity with Microsoft 365 tools (Outlook, Teams, basic file management).



Why Join Us

This position provides an exciting opportunity to contribute to large-scale creative productions, gain valuable experience in event-driven motion design, and collaborate with experienced creative teams in a structured, supportive environment.

title: Virtual Receptionist - Law Office
description:
VIDEO INTRODUCTION REQUIRED



Job Overview:

We are seeking a high-energy, professional, and fluent English-speaking Virtual Receptionist to serve as the first point of contact for our potential new clients. In this role, you aren’t just answering phones—you are the "voice" of our brand. Your goal is to make every caller feel heard, valued, and confident in our services from the very first second.



Key Responsibilities:



Initial Intake: Enthusiastically greet potential clients and gather preliminary information.



Communication: Handle inbound calls and inquiries with a polished, professional, and empathetic tone.



Scheduling: Coordinate and log lead details accurately into our system.



Follow-up: Ensure no potential client is left waiting by managing quick turnarounds on initial inquiries.



Required Qualifications:



Neutral Accent & Fluency: Exceptional verbal and written English skills are non-negotiable.



Personality: You must have a "smile in your voice" and a genuinely helpful, outgoing personality.



Reliability: A quiet home office setup with high-speed internet and a reliable power backup.



Experience: Previous experience in customer service, sales, or front-desk roles is highly preferred.



Why Join Us?

We offer a stable, long-term opportunity with a professional team that values clear communication and hard work.





Please send a brief introduction about yourself and attach a 30-60 second voice recording (or a link to one) telling us why you’re a great fit for a client-facing role. Applications without a voice sample will not be considered.



A Quick Tip for OnlineJobs.ph:

Because "fluency" is subjective on job boards, the voice recording requirement is the best way to filter candidates quickly. You’ll be able to tell within ten seconds if their tone and accent align with your firm's brand.



Would you like me to draft a few specific "screening questions" you can use to further vet the top candidates during the interview phase?

title: Customer Support Manager
description:
I am an online course creator and need help supporting my students.



We help doctors in the UK prep for their job interviews. We aim to create a supportive environment where our students can build their confidence and get results.



We are unique because we:



- we get them, we have their back, and we are there for them for whatever they need

- we have a supportive community of people just like them

- we tell them what they need to hear (not just platitudes) to get results 



We’re looking for a top-performing Customer Support Manager to join our team to help support the 2000 students we have in our community. We use Circle as our community platform.



We are looking for someone who gets stuff done, is true to their word, and who makes suggestions for how to improve things, not just sticking with what is working. 



This is to start as soon as possible! So this is a great job, but you must be willing to commit and go all-in 100%!





As our Customer Support Manager, you will have oversight of responding to student queries via DM,
, circle, and support tickets. You will also make sure we have coaching availability for student 1:1 calls. This includes liaising with coaches, students and using Calendly. You will be in charge of implementing a system to make sure this all runs smoothly.



This position is 20 hours a week.





The mission of the role is simple:

To keep a smooth experience for our Academy students so that they can get the most out of what we do and get the results they want.



As a Customer Support Manager, you will have 2 core responsibilities:



1. Responding to student queries promptly (within 24 hours) using our core values to communicate effectively -  these are submitted via Circle DM,
, WhatsApp, support ticket, on in our Circle support spaces 



2. Overseeing availability and implementation of 1:1 coaching calls

- students can book calls with coaches depending on what tier they are in

- the role is to ensure availability for students, allowing coaches to plan well in advance, and foresee any capacity issues and arrange more coaching availability if needed



You should be confident using Circle, Calendly, Kit, Kajabi, Zapier, and Slack.



Please complete the application form here:

title: Business Capture & Coordination Specialist
description:
Job Title: Business Capture & Coordination Specialist



Department: Procurement / Business Development

Reports To: Director of Procurement / VP of Business Development

Schedule: Full-Time | Monday – Friday 7AM-3:30PM PST (grave)



________________________________________

Position Summary

The Business Capture & Coordination Specialist is responsible for identifying, reviewing, and coordinating business opportunities that align with the company’s mission, strategic goals, and growth objectives. This role serves as the central point of coordination for new opportunities, ensuring cross-department collaboration, deadline management, and timeline accountability.

This position is critical to the company’s revenue growth, contract pipeline, and long-term business strategy, particularly in a government contracting and security services environment.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Opportunity Identification & Review

• Review and evaluate new business opportunities (RFPs, RFQs, RFIs, solicitations, and leads) to determine alignment with company goals, capabilities, and mission.

• Conduct initial opportunity assessments and summarize key requirements, risks, and resource needs.

• Track and maintain all opportunities in the company pipeline.

Capture Coordination & Management

• Coordinate all internal departments involved in new opportunities, including:

o Operations

o HR

o Finance

o Compliance

o Legal

o Leadership

• Ensure all departments understand their responsibilities, deliverables, and deadlines for each opportunity.

• Serve as the central point of contact for opportunity coordination.

Timeline & Deadline Management

• Develop and maintain capture timelines and proposal schedules.

• Track milestones, submissions, and internal review deadlines.

• Proactively follow up with stakeholders to ensure tasks are completed on time.

• Escalate risks or delays to leadership immediately.

Cross-Functional Collaboration

• Facilitate internal meetings related to new opportunities and capture strategy.

• Coordinate internal reviews and approvals.

• Ensure alignment between procurement, operations, and leadership throughout the capture process.

Documentation & Reporting

• Prepare and maintain capture tracking logs, dashboards, and reports.

• Provide regular updates to leadership on opportunity status, pipeline health, and upcoming deadlines.

• Organize and maintain opportunity files and documentation.

Sales & Business Development Support

• Support sales and business development leadership with:

o Market research

o Competitive analysis

o Opportunity tracking

o Capture planning

• Assist in developing capture strategies and pursuit plans.

Process Improvement & Compliance

• Support development and improvement of capture processes and procedures.

• Ensure all opportunity pursuits follow company policies and compliance requirements.

• Assist with post-submission reviews and lessons learned.

________________________________________

Qualifications

• 3–5+ years of experience in business development, capture management, procurement, or proposal coordination.

• Experience in government contracting, security services, or regulated industries strongly preferred.

• Strong project management and coordination skills.

• Proven ability to manage multiple deadlines and competing priorities.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

• Strong attention to detail and follow-through.

• Proficient in Microsoft Office (especially Excel, Word, PowerPoint); CRM or capture tools a plus.

• Ability to work cross-functionally with leadership and operational teams.

________________________________________

Key Competencies

• Highly organized and deadline-driven

• Strategic and analytical thinker

• Strong follow-up and accountability mindset

• Professional and confident communicator

• Comfortable working in fast-paced, high-pressure environments

________________________________________

Why This Role Is Critical

This position directly supports:

• Revenue growth

• Pipeline development

• On-time proposal submissions

• Cross-department accountability

• Strategic business expansion

Without this role, opportunities are missed, deadlines slip, and revenue is left on the table. This is a sales-enabling, mission-critical position.

title: Senior Experienced Project Manager & Call Handler (Property Maintenance & Renovations) – Remote Role
description:
Hello,



PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING



We take great pride in our thorough and rigorous recruitment process. Please do NOT apply unless you have substantial experience working remotely in property maintenance and improvement – including handyman services, renovations, plumbing, and painting.



This is a fully remote position, and we are specifically looking for candidates who have previously worked remotely in this field.



We are not a property management company; we specialise in property maintenance. If you're unsure about the difference between the two, this role may not be the right fit for you. We need someone with extensive experience in maintenance, repairs, and refurbishments who understands the technical aspects of keeping properties in top condition and can effectively coordinate work from a remote setting.



Do you fit the role?

-Are you a highly experienced and skilled Project Manager (Maintenance Coordinator) with a passion for property maintenance and improvement?

- Do you have at least five years of remote work experience in this sector?

-Can you confidently handle client PHONE CALLS and manage communication professionally?

- Do you excel in time management, organisation, and remote team coordination?



If so, this could be a fantastic opportunity for you!



About Us

We are a well-respected property maintenance and improvement company based in London, UK. We focus on delivering high-quality services and take pride in our professionalism, attention to detail, and customer satisfaction.



Position Overview

We are looking for a Project Manager with at least five years of full-time remote experience in the property maintenance and improvement sector (covering renovations, plumbing, electrical, and handyman jobs). The ideal candidate will have a STRONG background in construction and renovation, with a very deep understanding of property maintenance challenges and solutions.



This role requires exceptional attention to detail, strong communication skills, and the ability to manage tasks efficiently from a remote setting.



Essential Requirements



1. Remote Experience

Minimum 3-5 years of experience in property maintenance and improvement, working remotely with construction or renovation companies. [PLEASE NOTE YOU MUST HAVE WORKED REMOTELY, WORKING FOR THE LOCAL MARKET IS NOT SUFFICIENT. ]

Experience in managing remote teams and coordinating jobs without being on-site.



2. Language & Communication

Fluent in spoken and written English, with a clear, neutral accent.



3. Job Management Systems & CRM

Proficiency in job management systems such as ServiceM8, 
, or similar.



4. Time Management & Administration

Ability to handle multiple tasks efficiently in a remote setting.



5. Telephone Skills

Exceptional phone skills for handling client inquiries, scheduling, and team coordination.



6. Initiative & Self-Motivation

Proactive and self-driven – someone who takes the initiative and continuously seeks process improvements.



7. Responsiveness & Urgency

Quick to respond to
s and phone calls, handling matters with a sense of urgency.

Comfortable with voice and video calls when required.



8. Quoting & Invoicing

Ability to prepare accurate quotes and invoices independently.



9. Note-Taking & Follow-Up

Excellent record-keeping – maintaining detailed notes on jobs, timesheets, and meetings, and ensuring timely follow-ups with customers and staff.



10. Staff Management

Experience in coordinating and managing field staff remotely.



11. Working Hours

8:00 AM – 5:30 PM GMT (UK Time) – you must be available during UK working hours.



Why Join Us?

-Work remotely with a reputable UK-based company.

- Join a passionate and professional team.

- Use your expertise to make a real impact.

- Be part of a company that values excellence, attention to detail, and high standards.



How to Apply

Please ONLY apply if you meet all the above requirements and have extensive experience in remote property maintenance coordination.



To apply:

1) Send your updated CV.

2) AT THE SAME TIME Record a short video (via Loom or Google Drive) explaining:



-Your relevant remote work experience.

-Why you are a great fit for this role. And how you can handle phone calls to make sales.





This ensures that only serious applicants who have read the job description carefully are considered.



Applications without a video will not be reviewed.





Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.





In summary





This role requires strong sales abilities and the confidence to engage with new clients over the phone. You must have a proven track record in selling property maintenance services to new customers on the phone, as this is not an easy job.



Fluency in UK English is essential—you must be able to communicate clearly, understand client needs, and convince potential customers to use our services. While training will be provided, this role is not suitable for those who have never sold to brand-new customers or lack experience in converting inquiries into bookings.



In summary, we need someone who can handle calls exceptionally well, build trust with clients, and demonstrate strong technical knowledge of the property maintenance sector to guide them effectively.



We look forward to welcoming an exceptional remote Project Manager / Maintenance Coordinator to our team!

, or similar).

description:

About Us

title: E-commerce Customer Support & Order Operations Specialist
description:
We are hiring one highly structured and detail-oriented Customer Support & Order Operations Specialist for our growing e-commerce fashion brand.



This is a non-voice role. No calls. No sales outreach.



We are looking for someone who understands that professional customer support is about following structured processes, protecting margin, and handling order-related issues accurately.





REQUIRED EXPERIENCE

You must have experience with Gorgias for ticket handling, macros, tagging, and internal notes. You must have experience with Shopify for order lookup, order edits, and tracking checks. You must have experience using Microsoft Excel for structured tracking sheets and accurate updates. You must also have experience working inside SOPs and decision frameworks.



If you have not used Gorgias professionally in an e-commerce environment, please do not apply.





RESPONSIBILITIES

You will handle order status and tracking inquiries, shipping delays and carrier updates, address corrections, product and sizing questions, and order-related issues using defined SOPs.



Refunds or compensations may only be issued within approved SOP boundaries. Cases outside the SOP must be escalated. Situations not covered by macros must be handled manually using internal documentation and AI tools. All cases must be documented accurately in Excel tracking sheets. Tagging and internal notes in Gorgias must be precise.



We value careful decision-making over rushed actions, similar to selecting the right mango instead of simply picking the first one you see.





WORKING HOURS

Our customers are based in Canada.



Availability during Canadian business hours, approximately 10:00 PM to 2:00 AM Philippine Time, is a strong advantage. While flexibility is possible, candidates who are comfortable working late evening hours will be prioritized, as this allows faster response times and smoother operations.





WORK STRUCTURE

This role starts at 1 to 2 hours per day and is expected to grow to 2 to 4 hours per day over time. This is a long-term opportunity. Compensation is 4 to 6 USD per hour based on experience.



We prioritize reliability, consistency, and precision.





HOW TO APPLY

Provide clear and concise answers to the following questions, and begin your application with a fruit name mentioned in this job description.



1. How long have you used Gorgias, and in what type of e-commerce business?

2. Describe your experience using Excel in a support or operations role.

3. What SOP or framework did you follow in your previous role when handling refunds?

4. What type of e-commerce niche(s) have you worked in?

5. Briefly describe how you handle a delayed order when a customer pressures you for a refund.

6. Are you comfortable working between 10:00 PM to 2:00 AM Philippine time consistently?

title: Video Editor
description:
Company: Review Harvest

Location: Remote

Type: Full-Time

Industry: SaaS / Media / Content Creation



About Review Harvest

Review Harvest is a fast-growing SaaS company that helps local businesses grow their visibility and trust through automated Google review generation. As we expand our brand through content, we’re building a media engine powered by high-impact YouTube videos, daily shorts, livestreams, and a weekly podcast.



We’re looking for a creative, reliable, full-time video editor to join our team and bring our content to life — in the style of Alex Hormozi, with clean, fast-paced visuals that grab attention and deliver value.



What You'll Do

Edit 3 long-form YouTube videos per week (shared across a team)



Create 3–5 short-form clips per long-form video for YouTube Shorts, Reels, and TikTok



Design thumbnails that are optimized for high click-through rates



Add animations, B-roll, text overlays, and AI-powered visuals to elevate storytelling



Edit podcast recordings and coaching calls into structured content



Collaborate via Trello and 
 to keep everything running smoothly



What We're Looking For

Proven experience editing for YouTube and short-form platforms



Strong sense of storytelling, pacing, and audience engagement



Deep understanding of Alex Hormozi-style editing (both long- and short-form)



Highly skilled in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve



Experience with CapCut, Descript, or other short-form editing tools



Ability to source and apply creative B-roll and AI-powered visuals



Confident in Canva, Photoshop, or Figma for thumbnail design



Self-directed problem solver who takes ownership and meets deadlines



Bonus: Background in SaaS, business, or local marketing content



Tools You'll Use

Trello (project management)




 (collaboration and feedback)



Google Drive



Adobe Suite / CapCut / Descript



AI tools like Runway, Pika Labs, ChatGPT, Midjourney, Opus Clip, etc.



What We Offer

Generous compensation for experienced editors — we value skill and pay accordingly



Full-time, stable work with a fast-moving SaaS company



Clear creative direction with flexibility to bring your ideas



A collaborative team — you won’t be expected to handle everything alone



Freedom to work from anywhere



Long-term growth opportunities as our content machine scales



How to Apply

Please send an
 to [your
] or apply via this form:

???? [Insert Typeform or Google Form link]



Include:



A video introduction (1–2 minutes) telling us about your background and editing style



A link to your portfolio or work samples



3 examples: 1 long-form video, 1 short-form clip, and 1 thumbnail you’ve created

title: US - Bookkeeper
description:

1-800 Accountant is America’s leading virtual accounting firm for small businesses. Our mission is to provide financial expertise to small businesses in every industry. Our services are powered by a mix of expert CPAs and technology, enabling businesses to minimize tasks while maximizing tax savings. This allows owners to focus their time and energy on growing their businesses while we handle the rest.



We are defining a new accounting services model to help business owners navigate the new economy. title: Business Development Manager
description:
We're looking for a highly organized and relationship-focused Business Development Manager to help manage and grow a large network of professional contacts in the entertainment industry (music, sports, film/TV, digital). This role is about meaningful outreach, follow-up, and building long-term trust across a large portfolio.



If you're detail-oriented, a strong communicator, and excited by the world of entertainment, this role could be a great fit. Must have good English writing abilities without use of AI. 



What You’ll Be Doing:



- Manage a High Volume of Contacts: Oversee a large list of professional accounts, ensuring regular communication and accurate recordkeeping.

- Outreach & Relationship Building: Proactively reach out to contacts via
 and social media to stay connected, share updates, and strengthen professional relationships.

- Craft Well-Written Messages: Write polished, thoughtful
s and messages in English—clear, natural communication is key.

- Track Progress: Use tools like HubSpot to manage follow-ups, keep conversations organized, and hit relationship-building goals.

- Work Toward Clear Targets: While there’s no selling involved, this role does have measurable outreach and engagement goals.

- Think Creatively: Develop new approaches for keeping relationships active, warm, and productive over time.



Who We’re Looking For:

- Excellent written English—you’re comfortable writing professional messages and outreach
s with clarity and polish. - - -- Must have strong English writing and speaking abilities.

- Extremely organized—you can juggle many accounts and keep your outreach and follow-ups on track.

- Self-motivated and driven—you take initiative, meet goals, and stay focused without constant supervision.

- Relationship-minded—you enjoy connecting with people and maintaining positive, long-term communication.

- Familiarity with CRM tools like HubSpot is a plus.

- Spanish fluency is a plus, but not required.

- A genuine interest in the entertainment industry—especially music, sports, film/TV, or digital media—will help you succeed in this role.

title: Django Engineer
description:
Hiring Filipino and Philippine-based professionals only!



Wingz, is a leading US rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT). 

Visit our website: 



Job Summary:

As a Django Engineer at Wingz, you will be responsible for developing and maintaining our web applications, ensuring they are robust, scalable, and performant. You will work closely with our cross-functional teams to design, build, and enhance features that improve user experience and drive business growth.



Work Schedule:  PH Hours or US Hours (EST)

Work Setup:  Remote | Independent Contractor

Employment Type:  Full-Time | Long-Term Opportunity

Salary Range:  $2,000-3,000/ Month (USD)

Perks:  Unlimited PTO days + HMO (after probation)

Payout:  Semi-Monthly

Equipment:  Self-Provided



Key Responsibilities:



Develop and Maintain Web Applications:

• Design, develop, and maintain scalable APIs using Django REST framework

• Write clean, efficient, and reusable code following best practices and coding standards.

• Ensure the performance, quality, and responsiveness of applications.



Collaborate with Cross-Functional Teams:

• Work closely with front-end developers, designers, and product managers to implement new features and improve existing ones.

• Participate in code reviews, providing and receiving constructive feedback to ensure code quality.

• Collaborate with DevOps engineers to optimize deployment processes and infrastructure.



Database Management:

• Write efficient queries and manage database migrations.

• Ensure data integrity and security.



Testing and Debugging:

• Provide technical support and guidance to tea
mbers and stakeholders.

title: NEMT Routing Specialist
description:
Hiring Filipino and Philippine-based professionals only!



Wingz, is a leading US rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT). 

Visit our website: 



Job Summary:



The NEMT Routing Specialist plays a critical role in the day-to-day operations of our transportation services. This role involves planning efficient routes, assigning trips to drivers, negotiating trip acceptance, and ensuring schedules run smoothly. Strong presentation and negotiation skills are key to motivating drivers to accept assigned trips and maintaining operational efficiency.



You will work closely with U.S.-based operations staff and drivers to optimize scheduling, improve trip efficiency, and maintain a high standard of service for patients.



 Work Schedule:  US Hours (EST)

 Work Setup:  Remote | Independent Contractor

 Employment Type:  Full-Time | Long-Term Opportunity

 Fixed Salary: USD 900/ Month

 Perks:  10 PTO days + HMO (after probation)

 Payout:  Semi-Monthly

 Equipment:  Self-Provided



Key Responsibilities:



• Plan, schedule, and optimize daily transportation routes for NEMT drivers.

• Assign trips to drivers and ensure acceptance through effective communication, presentation, and negotiation.

• Monitor driver schedules and adjust routes as needed for delays, cancellations, or emergencies.

• Communicate with drivers proactively to resolve concerns, provide support, and encourage timely trip acceptance.

• Ensure all trips comply with NEMT regulatory requirements and company policies.

• Maintain accurate records of trips, drivers, and route changes using company software.

• Collaborate with dispatch, operations, and customer support teams to resolve scheduling conflicts.

• Identify opportunities to improve routing efficiency and reduce operational costs.

• Generate reports on route performance, on-time metrics, and driver engagement.

• Provide insights and recommendations to management to enhance overall transportation operations.



Qualifications:



• At least 2 years of experience in routing, dispatch, logistics coordination, or transportation planning (experience with NEMT or U.S.-based operations is a plus).

• Background in sales, customer service, or client engagement is highly preferred to leverage presentation and negotiation skills with drivers.

• Strong English communication skills (verbal and written).

• Ability to motivate and influence drivers to accept trips while maintaining positive relationships.

• Familiarity with routing and mapping software (e.g., Google Maps, Waze, or route optimization tools).

• Excellent organizational, problem-solving, and time management skills.

• Ability to multitask and manage last-minute changes effectively.

• High attention to detail and accuracy in record-keeping.

• Comfortable working with U.S. time zones (EST).

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet workspace suitable for remote work.



Preferred Skills (Optional but Advantageous):



• Prior experience in Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT) operations.

• Familiarity with NEMT software platforms.

• Knowledge of U.S. transportation regulations and compliance requirements.

• Experience in data analysis or route optimization strategies.



What We Offer:



• Competitive monthly compensation in USD 

• Performance-based monthly bonus ($
per month)

• Paid training and onboarding

• Long-term and stable remote opportunity

• Opportunity for career growth in operations

title: Distribution Specialist
description:
Company: BriarBear

Location: Fully Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Graveyard Shift (Start time between 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM PH Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time



About this Role

We are hiring a Distribution Specialist to own and drive organic growth for a portfolio of

AI-powered digital products.

BriarBear builds consumer products, SaaS tools, and mobile apps that all have AI at their

core—AI chatbots with proprietary knowledge bases, AI-powered matching, and intelligent

workflows. These products live or die by distribution, and today, distribution is dominated by

TikTok and Instagram Reels.

This role is responsible for turning business goals (traffic, users, revenue) into clear growth

strategies, then driving a creative team to execute those strategies while measuring what

works and what doesn’t.

This is not a hands-on video editing role.

This is not a purely creative role.

This is a strategy, execution, and accountability role focused on:

? Impressions

? Traffic

? Conversion

? Revenue impact



What You’ll Be Responsible For

1. Own Organic Growth Strategy (TikTok & Reels First)

? Develop and continuously refine organic growth strategies primarily for:

? TikTok

? Instagram Reels

? Stay current on:

? Viral formats

? Hooks

? CTAs

? Platform-specific best practices

? Study and apply learnings from growth-focused resources (e.g., Social Growth

Engineers and similar newsletters).



You are expected to know why something works—not just that it worked.

2. Translate Business Goals Into Measurable Growth Targets

You will take high-level goals such as:

? “300,000 monthly unique visitors to a website”

? “Drive signups for a consumer AI product”

? “Recruit both sides of a marketplace”

And translate them into:

? Monthly impression targets

? Posting cadence requirements

? Funnel assumptions (impressions ? clicks ? users ? customers)

? Clear milestones (e.g., 0 ? 100K ? 300K ? 3M impressions)

You are accountable for defining the path, not just executing tasks.

3. Funnel Thinking & Conversion Optimization

? Design and test content strategies that convert:

? Impressions ? website visits

? Website visits ? signups

? Signups ? paying customers

? D
 and test:

? Direct CTA vs. curiosity-based CTA

? Comment-driven discovery vs. link-out traffic

? Website vs. app store routing

? Monitor conversion rates at each stage and adjust strategy accordingly.

You must understand that views without conversion are failure, not success.

4. Lead and Direct the Creative Team

? Work with video editors and scriptwriters to:

? Set creative direction

? Define hooks, angles, and CTAs

? Ensure output meets quality and brand standards

? Review content before it goes live to ensure:

? Clean grammar

? Good taste

? Proper framing and cuts

? No careless errors

? Push the team to execute faster and smarter when data shows something is working.

This role requires strong judgment and the ability to give clear, direct feedback.



5. Measurement, Reporting, and Iteration

? Track and report on:

? Impressions

? Click-through rates

? Conversion rates

? Cost per result (organic and paid when applicable)

? Identify winning formats and double down.

? Kill underperforming ideas quickly.

? Share insights with leadership regularly.

If growth stalls, you own diagnosing why and proposing a fix.

6. Product-Specific Growth Strategies

You will manage growth across multiple products, each with different audiences and

strategies, including:

? Consumer AI chatbots

? SaaS tools

? Mobile apps

? Marketplace-style products (e.g., job boards)

Example:

? Using Filipino UGC content to recruit job seekers locally

? Using different messaging to attract U.S.-based employers

? Tailoring content strategy by product, audience, and funnel stage

7. Paid Growth (Later Stage)

? Once organic traction is established, assist with:

? Testing paid ads on TikTok, Instagram,
, and

? Defining metrics like CPM, CAC, and ROAS

? Organic-first mindset, paid second.



Who You Are

? Strategic thinker with a strong bias toward execution

? Comfortable owning numbers and being accountable for outcomes

? Able to give and receive direct feedback

? Obsessed with learning what makes content convert—not just go viral

? Organized, detail-oriented, and quality-driven

? Comfortable working closely with leadership

? Fluent in English (written and verbal)



Required Skills & Experience

? Proven experience in:

? Social media growth

? Product marketing

? Performance or growth marketing

? Deep familiarity with:

? TikTok and Instagram Reels ecosystems

? Organic content distribution

? Strong understanding of:

? Funnels

? Conversion metrics

? Audience targeting

? Experience managing or directing creative teams

? Comfortable working graveyard shift aligned with US-based teams



Nice to Have (But Not Required)

? Experience marketing apps or SaaS products

? Experience launching products from zero

? Familiarity with UGC-driven growth

? Data analysis or experimentation background

? Experience scaling from low traction to high-volume reach



Why This Role Matters

This role directly determines:

? Whether products succeed or fail

? Whether the company grows sustainably

? Whether creative effort turns into real business outcomes



Click here to apply:

title: LinkedIn Social Media Coordinator & Post writer
description:
We are seeking an experienced LinkedIn Social Media Coordinator to manage and grow our professional presence within the academia and education sector.



This is not an entry level role. We are only considering candidates with proven LinkedIn experience. We also require the person to have a full undergraduate degree (not an associate degree) and a master's degree. 



You will use AI tools such as ChatGPT to generate structured post drafts, then professionally edit and refine them into strong, authoritative LinkedIn content suitable for academics, researchers, and international families.



Excellent written English and strong editing ability are essential. You must be able to transform AI generated drafts into polished, credible professional content.



Key Responsibilities:



AI Assisted LinkedIn Content Writing:

Use AI tools to generate first draft LinkedIn posts based on internal strategy and topic guidelines.

Edit and refine drafts into high level, authoritative content with strong structure and clarity.

Publish 3 to 5 high quality LinkedIn posts per week focused on higher education, university admissions (UK and US), research strategy, psychology, and academic consulting.



LinkedIn Strategy and Profile Management:

Maintain and optimize founder and company LinkedIn profiles to reflect intellectual leadership.

Advise on positioning and growth strategy based on real LinkedIn platform experience.



LinkedIn Contact Management and Outreach:

Execute strategic connection campaigns targeting professors, academics, school leaders, and education partners.

Manage professional outreach conversations and track response rates.

Maintain structured CRM tracking in Notion or spreadsheets.



Engagement and Network Growth:

Engage with relevant academic and professional content to increase visibility and authority.



Performance Tracking:

Track weekly metrics including impressions, engagement rates, connection growth, response rates, and qualified leads.

Submit structured weekly reports.



Required Skills and Qualifications:



Proven LinkedIn Experience Required:

You must have prior experience managing LinkedIn accounts or running LinkedIn outreach campaigns.

Please be prepared to provide links to LinkedIn profiles or posts you have personally managed.



Advanced English Writing and Editing Skills:

Ability to elevate AI generated drafts into strong, persuasive, and credible professional content.



AI Tool Proficiency:

Comfortable using ChatGPT or similar tools to generate and refine structured drafts.



Understanding of Academia or Education Industry:

Strong preference for candidates familiar with universities, research culture, or admissions consulting.



Highly Organized and Process Driven:

Comfortable following SOPs and maintaining structured systems.



Application Instructions



To apply, answer the following 5 questions:



Share one LinkedIn post you personally wrote that performed well. Include the topic, approximate impressions, and why you believe it performed well.



Describe one LinkedIn outreach campaign you managed. What was the acceptance rate of connection requests, and what messaging structure did you use?



Describe a time when a LinkedIn post you wrote underperformed. What do you believe caused it, and what specific changes did you make afterward?



Do you have a full undergraduate degree (not an associate degree) and a Master's degree? 



Although AI use is fine at work, but if you use AI to answer these questions, your application will be automatically unsuccessful.



Organise from most to least what is important to you at work: money, work-life balance, job stability, personal growth and respect. 



SKILL REQUIREMENT



LinkedIn Strategy and Management

Advanced English Writing and Editing

AI Prompting and Content Refinement

Professional Communication

CRM and Data Tracking
