title: HIRING ASAP! Email Marketer
description:
We’re on the lookout for an
 Marketer to drive high-performing campaigns and automated flows that turn browsers into buyers across our Shopify stores.





The Challenge

We’re on the lookout for an
 Marketer to drive high-performing campaigns and automated flows that turn browsers into buyers across our Shopify stores. You'll own our entire
 marketing function — from strategy and setup to creative execution and performance analysis. Your mission? Manage flows, launch campaigns, and increase revenue from
 by at least 5% within your first 90 days. You’ll play a key role in how we communicate, convert, and retain our customers.





A Day in the life of an
 Marketer at GTE

-You’ll manage
 marketing end-to-end across all stores, from automated flows to single campaigns.

-You’ll initiate SMS and WhatsApp marketing, adding new channels to engage our customers.

-You’ll run A/B tests to continuously optimize subject lines, content, timing, and design for the best results.

-You’ll report on campaign performance, tracking key metrics to measure impact and guide improvements.

-You’ll own and manage the
 marketing calendar, ensuring campaigns are timely, relevant, and aligned with store activities.



Early Success Milestones for this role


 flow revenue reaches 10% of total store revenue within the first 90 days

-Returning customer rate grows to 5% for selected stores

-Timely testing and reporting on SMS, WhatsApp and in-app notifiications

-Campaigns and flows are running consistently and optimized for performance

-Pilot in-app notification campaigns







Your Team When You Join Us

You’ll be joining a passionate, performance-driven marketing team that supports multiple Shopify stores. We value people who can take ownership, move fast, and make things better every day.







We would love to hear from you if…

-You have at least 3 years of experience in
 marketing within the Fashion or Home industry, particularly across Europe or the USA.

-You have proven experience working with Klaviyo and Shopify

-You bring extra value with experience in SMS marketing, WhatsApp marketing, or in-app push notifications (a big plus!).

-You are skilled in creating both strategic and tactical
 plans

-You have a data-driven mindset; you know how to measure and improve performance

-You take full ownership of your work, thrive in a fast-paced environment, and genuinely want to see your efforts succeed.



Couple of the notes about the role

-This role is an Independent Contractor position, offering flexibility, autonomy, and the opportunity to manage your own schedule.

-You must be able to commit at least 8 hours per day, 40 hours per week.

-We require everybody in the team to use Hubstaff (
) to track hours worked.





Compensation

We pay on an hourly basis — we’re open to reviewing rates based on experience and expertise. 



If you are excited about the opportunity and feel like you are a good fit, we encourage you to apply today here:

title: Ecommerce Multimedia Designer (Remote with flexible hours)
description:
Founded in 2018 and headquartered in The Netherlands, GTE is on a mission to build the most efficient global direct-to-consumer infrastructure and become the world’s largest e-commerce company—powered by a collective of successful, scalable brands. By end of 2026, we’re aiming to achieve $500 million in revenue and operate over 50 thriving online stores worldwide.



With a team of 160+ top-tier remote e-commerce professionals across the globe, we blend local brand experiences with cross-border logistics, ensuring every customer feels connected—no matter where they are.



At our core, we value hard work, freedom with responsibility, constant improvement, and a mindset of positivity. We believe in building a high-performance, remote-first culture where honesty, excellence, and creativity drive everything we do—because the future of work is global, and we’re building it together;





We’re on the lookout for a Multimedia Designer to join our expanding team and drive our company’s growth!





The Challenge

We’re looking for a Multimedia Designer who can bring speed, creativity, and AI-driven efficiency to our creative team. This role will support in producing product images, website graphics, and assist with AI video creation. The challenge is to deliver high-quality output quickly, reduce the need for revisions, and leverage AI tools effectively to maximize efficiency.



The Impact

By creating better creatives, you’ll directly help our ads and products sell better. With higher production levels at higher quality, your work will enable our media buyers, site managers, and the wider team to move faster and perform more effectively.







We would love to hear from you if…

- You have hands-on experience creating AI product videos and use AI tools daily with advanced techniques for video and image production.

- You bring strong graphic design skills and can deliver high-quality visuals quickly.

- You’re experienced in video editing (After Effects, CapCut) and AI video prompting (JSON, problem-solving).

- You’re proficient with Flora, Kling AI, and JSON prompting techniques.

- You have a premium version of ChatGPT, Claude, or Perplexity (a plus!).

- You’re AI-obsessed, work independently, and have a sharp eye for detail.

 -You’re comfortable in Figma (Auto Layout, Components, Variants).

- You consistently balance speed with quality of work.

 





System Requirements:

- Windows: i5 13th Gen or above, 16GB RAM or above.

- Mac: M2 or above.





Couple of the notes about the role

- This role is an Independent Contractor position, offering flexibility, autonomy, and the opportunity to manage your own schedule while making a meaningful impact on our operations. 

- You must be able to commit at least 8 hours per day, 40 hours per week.

- We require everybody in the team to use Hubstaff to track hours worked.





If you are excited about the opportunity and feel like you are a good fit, we encourage you to apply today here:

title: Google Media Buyer (Remote & flexible)
description:
Apply here: 

Apply here: 



GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company where smart ideas turn into real impact.

We build and scale online brands across international markets, and we empower our tea
mbers to take ownership, grow quickly, and shape the future of our business alongside us.



Why This Role Exists

This role plays a meaningful part in the growth of the company ????



As a Google Ads Media Buyer, you’ll directly contribute to improving the performance of our Google Ads channel which drives around 90% of our total revenue, while developing your skills in a performance-driven environment.



You’ll help elevate our campaign structure, strategy, and overall account performance, ensuring our ad spend translates into scalable and profitable growth.



This is a role for someone who wants to build, improve, and grow, not just maintain the status quo.



What You’ll Own & Build

In this role, you’ll be trusted with real responsibility from day one. Your success will be measured in your first 90 days based on the following metrics:

- Developing and implementing a new or improved Google Ads strategy

- Restructuring and optimizing Google Shopping campaigns for better scalability and efficiency

- Driving measurable performance improvements that result in a 20%+ increase in revenue from Google Ads

- Using data insights to continuously refine bidding, structure, and feed performance



What We’re Looking For

We’re excited to work with someone who:

- Has at least 3 years of hands-on experience in performance marketing or media buying

- Has direct experience with Google Shopping campaigns for large eCommerce catalogs (10,000+ products)

- Is highly proficient in Google Ads, Google Merchant Center, Google Analytics

- Ideally has experience with Google CSS Labelizer

- Thinks analytically and makes decisions based on data, not guesswork

- Enjoys testing, optimizing, and finding performance opportunities others might miss

- Is comfortable taking ownership of results and being accountable for revenue impact



Ready to Grow With Us?

If you’re looking for a role where your work matters, your growth is supported, and your impact is visible — we’d love to hear from you.

title: HIRING ASAP! Google Media Ads Buyer (Remote & flexible)
description:
Help scale brands. Own performance. Drive real revenue.



GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company where great ideas don’t sit in slides — they turn into real, measurable growth. We build and scale online brands across international markets, and our tea
mbers take real ownership, grow fast, and help shape the future of the company.



We’re now looking for a performance-driven Google Ads Media Buyer to help take our main revenue channel to the next level.



Why This Role Matters



Google Ads drives around 90% of our total company revenue. That means your work won’t just “support marketing”, it will directly influence the growth of the entire business.



This role is perfect for someone who loves improving systems, scaling performance, and turning data into smarter decisions. You won’t just manage campaigns, you’ll help evolve the way we run Google Ads.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- From day one, you’ll have real ownership. Within your first 90 days, success in this role will mean:

- Developing and rolling out a new or significantly improved Google Ads strategy

- Restructuring and optimizing Google Shopping campaigns for stronger scalability and efficiency

- Driving measurable performance improvements, targeting a 20%+ increase in revenue from Google Ads

- Using performance data to continuously refine bidding strategies, campaign structure, and product feed performance

- Your goal is simple: turn ad spend into scalable, profitable growth.



What We’re Looking For

We’re excited to work with someone who:

- Has at least 3 years of hands-on experience in performance marketing or media buying

- Has direct experience running Google Shopping campaigns for large eCommerce catalogs (10,000+ products)

- Has managed high-budget ad accounts ($300K+ per month)

- Is highly proficient in Google Ads, Google Merchant Center, and Google Analytics

- Ideally has experience with Google CSS Labelizer

- Thinks analytically and uses data to drive decisions, not guesswork

- Enjoys testing, optimizing, and uncovering performance opportunities others might miss

- Is comfortable taking full ownership of results and being accountable for revenue impact



Hiring Process

As part of our process, shortlisted candidates will complete a 19-minute Google Ads knowledge assessment. This helps us understand your hands-on expertise before moving forward to the HR interview stage.



Ready to Grow With Us?

If you’re looking for a role where your work matters, your growth is supported, and your impact is visible — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Executive Assistant (Construction Industry)
description:
Company Overview

A fast-growing construction and real estate development company based in Austin. The founder is highly active in the field, managing site crews, vendors, material orders, and development projects while also maintaining client and supplier relationships. The business is expanding, and leadership needs stronger operational support to streamline communication, coordination, and time management.



Role: Executive Assistant (Construction & Operations Support)

This is a full-time, high-trust gatekeeper role supporting the founder directly.

The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, confident on the phone, and comfortable coordinating vendors and construction teams. This person will act as a true extension of the founder, filtering communication, organizing priorities, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.





Core Responsibilities

1. Inbox & Communication Gatekeeping

Monitor and manage high-volume inbox (2,000+
s)

Filter: must-see vs reply vs archive

Draft and send replies on behalf of the founder

Flag urgent items

Maintain inbox organization and tagging

Act as internal communication buffer for team

Route internal team requests properly before they reach founder

This person is the primary filter and communication gatekeeper.



2. Daily Priority Management

Create structured daily briefings:

Must-do items

Important but not urgent

On radar

Send morning priority summary

Follow up on deadlines

Track outstanding tasks

Organize calendar blocks

Ensure time is allocated appropriately for site vs admin vs vendor calls

This role keeps the founder focused on high-value execution.



3. Construction Project Coordination Support

Work inside Buildertrend (construction PM tool)

Coordinate material orders

Track vendor communication

Build supply lists for upcoming projects

Draft and submit supplier
s

Ensure orders are placed on time

Track turnaround timelines

Follow up with vendors when needed

Maintain Airtable and Google Workspace systems

Not heavy accounting, but operational tracking and supply coordination.



4. Internal Team Coordination

Act as point of contact between site team and founder

title: Elite Performance Video Editor (High-Converting E-Commerce Ads)
description:
We are looking for a killer video editor who knows how to create high-converting ad creatives that elevate brand marketing and drive real results.



We are not looking for average.

We are not looking for beginners.

We are looking for the best of the best.



If that’s not you — DO NOT APPLY.



We run scaling eCommerce brands and are aggressively pushing our marketing to the next level. We need someone who understands that editing is not just about making videos look good — it’s about driving conversions, improving ROAS, and understanding buyer psychology.



This is NOT a short-term role.

If you perform well, you will have the opportunity to join us full-time and work across up to three different brands as we expand.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Creating high-converting video ads for paid social (Meta, TikTok, etc.)

Structuring ads for retention, pacing, and emotional engagement



Editing UGC, direct response ads, product-focused creatives, and brand storytelling pieces



Improving creatives based on feedback and performance data



Bringing creative ideas to the table — not just executing tasks



REQUIRED Skills (If You Do NOT Have These, DO NOT APPLY)

Smart and strategic thinker



Creative with strong editing instincts



Takes initiative (doesn’t need constant hand-holding)



Strong marketing knowledge (customer psychology, awareness levels, ad angles)

Follows instructions carefully



Improves quickly from feedback



Understands performance marketing

Application Requirements (READ CAREFULLY)

If you read this job post in full, add a ???? at the end of your application to confirm.



Applications without a portfolio or without the emoji will be automatically disregarded.

title: UK Estate Agency Operations & Sales Progression Manager
description:
About Us



We are a UK-based estate agency focused primarily on residential property sales, with smaller volumes of lettings and ongoing property management.



We operate using Vebra ALTO CRM and require someone who understands UK estate agency processes, compliance, and sales progression from instruction to completion.



This is not a basic admin role. We are looking for someone autonomous, detail-driven and commercially aware who can operate without hand-holding.



Important – Please Only Apply If



• You have prior UK estate agency / lettings / property experience

• You have used a property CRM system (ALTO preferred but not essential)

• Your spoken English is excellent and professional on the telephone

• You are confident communicating with UK solicitors, buyers, sellers, mortgage brokers, tenants and landlords

• You can work independently and solve problems without constant instruction



If you are a general VA without UK property experience, this role is not suitable.



Responsibilities – Sales (Primary Focus)



• Sales progression from offer agreed to completion

• Liaising with solicitors, buyers, sellers and brokers

• Chasing memorandum of sale acknowledgements

• Monitoring mortgage offers and searches

• Updating Vebra ALTO accurately and consistently

• Identifying delays and proactively resolving issues

• Referring solicitors to clients where appropriate



Responsibilities – Lettings (Light Volume)



• Offer progression

• Referencing coordination

• Right to Rent compliance

• Tenancy documentation

• Deposit registration reminders



Compliance



• AML checks

• Sanctions checks

• Memorandum of sale documentation

• Understanding of EPC, EICR, Gas Safety and Right to Rent requirements



Operations



• Maintaining CRM hygiene (Vebra ALTO)

• Spotting process gaps and improving them

• Creating systems to prevent repeated issues

• Reducing Director involvement in day-to-day admin



The Type of Person We Need



• Highly autonomous

• Strong attention to detail

• Commercially aware

• Calm under pressure

• Comfortable making decisions

• Proactive problem-solver

• Able to manage multiple property files simultaneously



Compensation Structure

Base Salary:

$500 per month



Commission Structure:



• $50 per successful solicitor referral (paid when the sale completes)

• $100 per completed sale (sales progression from offer to completion)

• $15 per completed letting progression



Quarterly Performance Bonus (Up to $500):



Based on accuracy, CRM hygiene, completion rates, communication quality, initiative shown, compliance adherence and process improvements introduced.



Bonus Tiers:



• Meets expectations: $200

• Exceeds expectations: $350

• Outstanding performance: $500



Telephone Requirement



You will regularly communicate with UK professionals and clients. Your spoken English must be clear, confident and professional. Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.



Application Process



Shortlisted candidates will complete:



• A paid test task involving a mock UK property file

• A short video or voice interview

• CRM understanding assessment



Working Hours



UK business hours 10am – 5pm.



To Apply



Please include:



• A short summary of your UK property experience

• The CRM systems you have used

• A voice recording introducing yourself

• The word “ALTO” in your subject line

title: Video Editor & Graphic Designer
description:
Location: Fully Remote (Must be based in the Philippines)



Job Type: Full-Time



Create scroll-stopping content for a scaling DTC brand. We need a performance-focused video editor who can turn raw footage into high-converting ads and social content - with creative freedom and direct feedback loops on what's working.



About Uproot Clean



Uproot Clean is a fast-growing, eco-friendly pet care brand expanding across major retailers like Walmart, Target, and Chewy. Our marketing team is scaling rapidly, and we're looking for a video editor who wants to grow their skills in performance marketing while building a long-term role with a mission-driven company.



The Role



You'll be our go-to editor for short-form video content that drives sales—think
/Instagram ads, TikTok content, and social clips. You'll work with a steady flow of creator and product footage, turning it into thumb-stopping content that performs. This isn't agency churn-and-burn; you'll see what converts, iterate based on data, and refine your craft with real-time feedback.



What You'll Do



Video Editing & Production

-Create high-performing
/Instagram ad creatives and social media clips

 and maintain organized asset libraries



Graphic Design & Assets

Project Management

-Track assignments and status updates in ClickUp

-Follow naming conventions and file organization protocols

-Communicate proactively about timelines, blockers, and questions





Requirements



3-5+ years of video editing experience, specializing in short-form content

Expert-level Adobe Premiere Pro skills (required)

Proven experience creating or editing
/Instagram ads

Mid-level proficiency with Photoshop, Illustrator, or Canva

Strong fundamentals in typography, color theory, composition, and motion graphics

Fluent English — excellent written and verbal communication

Self-managed — strong time management and ability to meet daily/weekly deadlines

Proactive communicator — asks questions early, flags issues before they become problems

Portfolio required — you must submit a portfolio showcasing your video editing work. Applications without portfolios will not be considered.

Background in DTC or e-commerce brands

Experience with remote collaboration tools (Slack, ClickUp, 
, Notion)

Familiarity with performance marketing metrics and what makes ads convert





Tech Requirements

Schedule



Monday-Friday: 10:00 PM - 7:00 AM EST (1-hour break)



Required: Weekly tea
eting on Thursdays at 10:00 AM EST





Benefits & Perks



Fully remote - work from anywhere in the Philippines

Paid time off

Flex days. Enjoy an extra quarterly day off to unwind and recharge energies whenever you desire.

Professional development - opportunities to learn and grow with the business





Ready to Apply?



If you love creating high-performing video content and have a portfolio that showcases your work, we want to see it. Apply now.



Note: Applications without portfolio samples will not be reviewed.

title: Accounting Virtual Assistant: Weekly Pay & Growth Opportunities
description:
Hi there!



We're searching for a highly motivated and detail-oriented Accounting Virtual Assistant to join our remote team. 



This remote position offers an exciting opportunity for you to contribute to our client's success while enjoying the freedom and flexibility of a work-from-home lifestyle.



If you're passionate about helping others succeed and want to grow your career in a dynamic and supportive environment, then read on…





== WHY WORK WITH US ==



Make a Difference at Pro Sulum: An Award-Winning Company Where You Matter.



We're not just about accolades (like being on the Inc. 5000 list) - we're about empowering our team to create real impact. At Pro Sulum, your contributions matter, and your unique talents are valued. Join a company that fosters personal growth, celebrates individuality, and champions success for all.





-> Benefits:



 * Competitive salary (Php 30,000 to Php 40,000) depending on experience

 * Pay Increase Opportunity Every 6 Months

 * Weekly Pay

 * Paid Service Incentive Leaves

 * Monthly Incentives

 * Referral Incentives

 * Virtual Company Events

 * Dynamic, fun, and supportive team

 * Part-time role as an independent contractor (not BPO)

 * Long-term opportunity with career growth and advancement





== THE POSITION ==



As the Accounting Virtual Assistant for a fast-growing full-service brand engagement and marketing firm, you’ll play a key role in supporting the company’s financial operations and ensuring accuracy across all accounting processes.



Your primary focus will include managing accounts payable and receivable, reconciling bank and credit card statements, preparing financial reports, assisting with invoicing and collections, and maintaining clean, organized financial records. You’ll work closely with leadership and cross-functional teams to ensure timely reporting and smooth day-to-day operations.



If you’re detail-oriented, numbers-driven, reliable, and proactive, with strong communication skills and a high level of integrity, this is your opportunity to grow within a dynamic and fast-paced organization.





-> Requirements:



• Accounting experience is a must.

• Must have strong Excel proficiency.

• Must have a high level of accuracy and attention to detail, and the ability to analyze data and exercise sound judgment.

• Availability for video calls is a must.

• Available to work part-time (20 hrs/wk) with a possibility of going full-time depending on performance.

• Can work during standard US business hours.

• Fast, stable internet connection (Minimum download speed 10 Mbps)

• Working computer/laptop (Minimum Requirement: Processor - Intel i5 or equivalent, RAM - 8GB).

• Backup power source or work location for power outages.





-> Nice to Have:



• Experience working within ERP systems, particularly NetSuite.

• Experience with shipping/logistics data imports





-> Responsibilities:



Duties and Responsibilities include but are not limited to:



• Utilize advanced Excel functions to manage, analyze, and reconcile data

• Maintain a high level of accuracy and attention to detail in all reports and entries

• Analyze financial and operational data to support decision-making and exercise sound judgment

• Perform accounting-related tasks including reconciliations, data validation, and financial tracking

• Participate in regular video calls for updates, reporting, and collaboration

• Work within ERP systems, particularly NetSuite, for data entry, reporting, and system maintenance

• Manage and process shipping and logistics data imports, ensuring accuracy and completeness

• Support cross-functional teams with data reporting and administrative financial tasks





-> About You:



For this position, the successful candidate will have/be:



* High Attention to Detail: You are accurate, consistent, and thorough in your work. 

* Dependable & Trustworthy: You complete tasks on time and follow through on your commitments.

* Resourceful & Proactive: You tackle challenges head-on and solve problems independently.

* Great Communicator: You excel in both written and verbal English communication.





== HOW TO APPLY ==



Ready to join us? Apply now and unlock your future with Pro Sulum!



If you are interested in this position and believe you have the qualities listed above to be successful, please complete this Google Form and FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS carefully.



APPLY HERE >>>





 - Due to the high volume of applications we receive, only candidates selected for further consideration will be contacted to move forward in the hiring process.



 - If you're a good fit for the role, you'll receive an
 from the Pro Sulum Recruitment Team within 1-2 weeks.



Congratulations on taking the first step towards a rewarding career with Pro Sulum! We're excited to learn more about you and explore the possibility of you joining our team.

title: Executive Virtual Assistant, Real Estate Manager
description:
Location: Remote, United-States East Coast Based

Type: Part-time with potential to grow (5–20 hours/week initially)

Schedule: Flexible, with some availability during U.S. business hours



OVERVIEW

We are seeking a highly capable Virtual Executive Assistant to support a entrepreneur who owns and operates a growing real estate company. This is a role designed for a critical thinker who values precision, accuracy, and structure, and who enjoys improving systems and helping a business operate more efficiently.



This role is best suited for someone who is meticulous, detail-oriented, proactive, and dependable. Accuracy, follow-through and ability to independently complete tasks are essential, as this position supports multiple businesses with many moving parts.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Real Estate Operations and Leasing Support



* Manage Zillow,
 Marketplace, and other real estate listing platforms

* Create, update, and maintain rental listings and advertisements

* Respond promptly and professionally to rental inquiries

* Maintain an accurate calendar of showings, tours, and open houses

* Coordinate with prospective tenants, agents, and contractors

* Draft lease agreements and related documents using provided templates

* Track deposits, rent schedules, and key lease terms

* Maintain records of roommates, occupants, and unit assignments

* Track move-ins, move-outs, turnovers, and deadlines

* Coordinate cleaning schedules, repairs, and unit readiness

* Maintain organized and up-to-date property and tenant records

* Assist with any and all additional tasks on as-needed basis



Business and Administrative Support (Non-Clinical)



* Assist with administrative coordination and scheduling logistics

* Prepare documents, summaries, and operational task lists

* Coordinate vendors, contractors, and service providers

* Support ongoing administrative projects and business needs

* Assist with any and all additional tasks on as-needed basis



Financial and Light Bookkeeping Support (as needed)



* Categorize transactions and file receipts



Operations, Systems, and Growth Support



* Identify inefficiencies and suggest process improvements

* Build and maintain workflows, SOPs, and checklists

* Create and manage task and project tracking systems

* Monitor deadlines and ensure precise follow-through

* Proactively suggest tools, automations, and organizational improvements

* Take ownership of recurring operational responsibilities over time

* Assist with any and all additional tasks on as-needed basis





IDEAL CANDIDATE



* Previous experience in real estate and direct client-facing roles

* Proven experience as a virtual assistant or executive assistant

* Extremely detail-oriented with a strong commitment to accuracy

* Meticulous, organized, and consistent in execution

* Strong critical thinking and problem-solving skills

* Able to manage multiple priorities without losing attention to detail

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

* Discreet and trustworthy with confidential information

* Self-directed and comfortable working independently



PREFERRED SKILLS AND TOOLS



* Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Docs, Sheets)

* Task or project management tools such as Monday, Trello, etc.

* Zillow,
 Marketplace, or similar listing platforms

* Familiarity with real estate operations or professional services environments



WHAT WE OFFER



* Long-term, stable role with opportunity to grow

* Flexible, remote work environment

* Clear expectations and consistent communication

* Opportunity to help improve systems and business efficiency

* Potential to increase hours and responsibility over time



HOW TO APPLY

Please include a brief description of your relevant experience, examples of similar work, and your availability. Please include a video sample of you speaking English.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter
description:

or
About Us

We specialise in helping local businesses get more calls and look more professional online.

?

?

?

?

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Automation Specialist
description:
GoHighLevel (GHL) Automation Specialist – Multi-Brand Property Business (UK)

Type

Part-time to start (15-20 hrs/week), long-term. UK-time overlap preferred. $5-$12 hour depending on experience and ability to successfully execute



What you’ll own (GHL is the core)

We run multiple UK property brands (THS / Berkshire Living / Berkshire Corporate). Your job is to make GHL our operating system:

-Build and maintain pipelines + stages per brand (clean logic, no messy overlap)

-Create workflows/automations: speed-to-lead, nurture, booked calls, no-show, rebook, long-term follow-up, reactivation

-Implement triggers based on: form submissions, stage changes, tags, calendar bookings, inactivity timers

-Improve deliverability + tracking: naming conventions, tags, custom fields, source attribution

-Build dashboards for weekly visibility: lead source ? booked ? show-up ? signed



Secondary (nice-to-have, not the core)

-Monitor our automated social content system and suggest weekly tweaks based on performance

-Help build simple tools/calculators later (
v experience is a bonus)



Requirements (non-negotiable)

-2+ years GoHighLevel (strong preference 3+)

-You can prove your work with Loom videos + screenshots

-You can troubleshoot workflows fast (you know why things don’t fire)

-You’re detail-obsessed: clean builds, naming conventions, documentation



How to apply (follow exactly, or we won’t review)

-Start your message with ANCHOR.

-Then answer:

-Years using GHL + strongest area (Workflows / Pipelines / Integrations / Reporting)

-2 Loom links (workflow build + troubleshooting example)

-Screenshot of a published workflow showing triggers/filters

-In 10 bullets: how you’d build lead ? booked call ? no-show ? rebook automation

-Hours/week + UK time overlap confirmation works with you

-Please fill in and send back the assessment result for:  
  

*Bonus: social media analytics experience + AI experience with likes of claude, manus, Lovable or other (if any)



Hiring process

-Quick screening ? short interview ? paid trial task (3–4 hours)

-Trial: build a mini workflow + reporting tags/fields, and explain your logic clearly.

title: Graphic Designer/Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designer to join our team! The ideal candidate will specialize in print design — including business cards, brochures, flyers, posters, and large-format materials such as banners and signage.



You’ll be working directly with different clients to bring their ideas to life, ensuring that every design meets both aesthetic and technical print standards. Strong communication skills, reliability, and the ability to stay highly productive during graveyard working hours are essential for this role.



*Key Responsibilities*



• Design and prepare print-ready layouts for various materials: business cards, brochures, flyers, tarpaulins, banners, and other large-format prints.

•Communicate directly with clients to understand their design needs and brand guidelines.

•Collaborate with the production team to ensure color accuracy, print quality, and technical feasibility.

•Manage multiple projects and deadlines while maintaining high design standards.

•Review proofs and samples to ensure precision before printing.

•Stay updated with design trends, printing techniques, and materials.

•Maintain consistent reliability and high productivity throughout the graveyard shift.



*Qualifications*



•Proven experience as a Graphic Designer with a strong portfolio focused on print materials.

•Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign) or equivalent tools.

•Excellent English communication skills — both written and verbal.

•Confident and comfortable in client-facing discussions.

•Highly detail-oriented — an absolute must for print work.

•Strong sense of layout, color, and typography.

•Ability to manage time effectively and meet deadlines.

•Familiarity with print production processes and specifications (bleed, resolution, CMYK, etc.).

•Knowledge of large-format printing is an advantage.

•Willingness to work the graveyard shift, demonstrating dependability and the ability to maintain exceptional performance during these hours.

title: Digital Media Manager
description:

Industry: Real Estate Sales, Property Management & Brokerage – Pennsylvania, USA



About Us



We are a growing real estate sales team, property management company, and brokerage serving Pennsylvania. Our focus is simple: build trust, communicate clearly, and grow long-term relationships in our communities.



We are hiring a full-time Digital Marketing Specialist to strengthen and expand our online presence across websites, social media, and AI-driven search platforms.

If that sounds like you, we look forward to connecting.

title: Part time PPC Manager (Google & Bing Ads)
description:
Role Overview:

We are seeking an experienced PPC Manager to lead the development, execution, and optimization of paid search campaigns across both Google Ads and Bing Ads. The ideal candidate will have a hands-on understanding of both platforms and proven success managing large-scale, complex campaigns with significant budgets. You will be responsible for delivering results-driven campaigns that align with client goals while maintaining a deep understanding of industry best practices. Previous experience working at Google or a strong insider knowledge of Google Ads best practices is highly advantageous.

As a PPC Manager, you’ll be the go-to expert for all things paid search and will have a direct impact on client performance. The role requires a strategic mindset, data-driven decision-making, and the ability to maintain clear and effective communication with both internal teams and clients.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Paid Search Strategy & Execution:

Campaign Development & Management: Develop, launch, and manage paid search campaigns on Google Ads and Bing Ads, ensuring they are aligned with client objectives and maximize ROI. This includes campaigns on Google Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Bing Search.

Keyword Research & Audience Targeting: Conduct extensive keyword research, competitor analysis, and audience segmentation to identify growth opportunities. Develop comprehensive strategies based on these insights to optimize targeting and bidding.

Campaign Optimization: Continuously analyze and refine campaigns to improve performance metrics such as CPC, CTR, CPA, and ROAS. Implement A/B testing strategies for ad creatives, landing pages, and bidding strategies to maximize conversions.

Ad Copy & Creative Strategy: Work closely with the creative team to ensure that ad copy, creatives, and landing pages are optimized for user engagement and aligned with campaign goals.

2. Client Communication & Consultation:

Client Liaison: Serve as the main point of contact for clients, providing expert consultation on all Google Ads and Bing Ads strategies. Clearly communicate campaign progress, adjustments, and results to ensure client satisfaction and alignment with business objectives.

Performance Reporting: Regularly prepare and present in-depth performance reports, including key performance metrics (CPC, CTR, CPA, ROAS) and actionable insights. Use these reports to showcase campaign successes and provide strategic recommendations for optimization.

Strategic Guidance: Offer strategic recommendations to clients, advising on how to improve campaign performance, expand reach, or address performance challenges. Proactively identify opportunities for growth.

Client Relationship Management: Build and nurture strong relationships with clients, becoming a trusted advisor on paid search and digital marketing. Ensure high levels of client satisfaction, resolve campaign-related issues, and manage client expectations effectively.

3. Budget Management & Performance Tracking:

Budget Oversight: Manage and optimize client budgets across both Google Ads and Bing Ads to ensure campaigns are efficient and within budget. Track and report on budget pacing and ensure that client goals are met while maximizing ROI.

Performance Tracking & Analysis: Utilize Google Analytics, Microsoft Advertising Intelligence, Google Tag Manager, and other analytics platforms to monitor campaign performance in real time. Assess KPIs such as CPC, CTR, CPA, and ROAS to ensure campaigns are delivering results within the defined parameters.

Optimization: Make data-driven decisions to optimize campaigns for better performance. Adjust bids, keywords, targeting, and ads based on performance trends and competitive insights.

4. Collaboration & Cross-Functional Alignment:

Team Collaboration: Work closely with the broader digital marketing team (SEO, Social Media, Creative, Web Development) to ensure that PPC campaigns are integrated into wider marketing and sales strategies. Align campaigns with broader business objectives, ensuring a cohesive approach across all digital channels.

Stakeholder Coordination: Collaborate with internal stakeholders to ensure paid search efforts align with company goals and support sales or product launch strategies.

Knowledge Sharing: Actively contribute to knowledge-sharing within the marketing team by educating peers about PPC best practices, emerging trends, and new tools or features in Google Ads and Bing Ads.

5. Industry Trend Awareness & Innovation:

Stay Current with PPC Trends: Stay up-to-date with the latest Google Ads and Bing Ads updates, features, and best practices. Attend webinars, conferences, and industry events to keep ahead of emerging trends and leverage new opportunities for clients.

Test New Strategies: Continuously evaluate and experiment with new tools, bidding strategies, and ad formats to ensure campaigns are always optimized and competitive. Propose new strategies to clients based on these findings.

6. Reporting & Data-Driven Insights:

Regular Reporting: Create and maintain regular performance reports, dashboards, and presentations to track campaign progress, analyze performance trends, and showcase ROI. Present these findings in a clear, concise manner to clients and internal teams.

Actionable Insights: Translate complex data into actionable insights that drive campaign improvements. Provide clear, data-backed recommendations to both internal and client stakeholders to guide future PPC strategies and decisions.

Attribution & Conversion Tracking: Implement and manage proper tracking systems to measure campaign effectiveness and provide accurate reporting on conversions, revenue, and other key metrics.



Qualifications:

Education:

Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience). Certifications in Google Ads and Bing Ads are a plus.



Experience:

Proven PPC Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of hands-on experience managing PPC campaigns across Google Ads and Bing Ads. This includes experience in Google Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Bing Search campaigns.

Agency or Client Experience: Experience working in a client-facing role, ideally in a digital marketing agency, managing multiple PPC accounts with large-scale budgets.

Experience at Google (Bonus): Previous experience working at Google or within a Google Partner agency is highly desirable, particularly if you have in-depth knowledge of Google Ads best practices, new features, and insights from working directly with the platform.



Technical Skills:

Google Ads & Bing Ads Expertise: Advanced proficiency in managing campaigns across Google Ads and Bing Ads, including search, display, shopping, remarketing, and video campaigns.

Analytics Tools Proficiency: Strong working knowledge of Google Analytics, Microsoft Advertising Intelligence, Google Tag Manager, and other relevant analytics and tracking tools to measure, report, and optimize PPC campaign performance.

Data Interpretation: Ability to analyze large datasets, interpret complex data, and turn insights into actionable strategies to optimize campaign performance.



Soft Skills:

Excellent Communication & Presentation Skills: Ability to explain complex PPC strategies and performance data in a clear, concise, and accessible manner for clients, internal teams, and stakeholders.

Client Management Experience: Proven experience in building and nurturing strong client relationships. Ability to manage client expectations and resolve issues in a timely and professional manner.

Problem-Solving & Proactive Mindset: Strong problem-solving skills, with a proactive approach to identifying and addressing campaign issues. Ability to think critically and take strategic action based on data.

Attention to Detail: High attention to detail, ensuring that campaign elements are precise and accurately reflect client objectives, even when working with large volumes of data.



How to Apply:

If you’re an experienced PPC Manager looking for a new challenge, we want to hear from you! Please submit your resume, along with a cover letter outlining your relevant experience. Include any specific campaigns or achievements that highlight your expertise with Google Ads and Bing Ads.

Performance Tracking & Analysis: Utilize Google Analytics, Microsoft Advertising Intelligence, Google Tag Manager, and other analytics platforms to monitor campaign performance in real time. Assess KPIs such as CPC, CTR, CPA, and ROAS to ensure campaigns are delivering results within the defined parameters.

Optimization: Make data-driven decisions to optimize campaigns for better performance. Adjust bids, keywords, targeting, and ads based on performance trends and competitive insights.

4. Collaboration & Cross-Functional Alignment:

Team Collaboration: Work closely with the broader digital marketing team (SEO, Social Media, Creative, Web Development) to ensure that PPC campaigns are integrated into wider marketing and sales strategies. Align campaigns with broader business objectives, ensuring a cohesive approach across all digital channels.

Stakeholder Coordination: Collaborate with internal stakeholders to ensure paid search efforts align with company goals and support sales or product launch strategies.

Knowledge Sharing: Actively contribute to knowledge-sharing within the marketing team by educating peers about PPC best practices, emerging trends, and new tools or features in Google Ads and Bing Ads.

5. Industry Trend Awareness & Innovation:

Stay Current with PPC Trends: Stay up-to-date with the latest Google Ads and Bing Ads updates, features, and best practices. Attend webinars, conferences, and industry events to keep ahead of emerging trends and leverage new opportunities for clients.

Test New Strategies: Continuously evaluate and experiment with new tools, bidding strategies, and ad formats to ensure campaigns are always optimized and competitive. Propose new strategies to clients based on these findings.

6. Reporting & Data-Driven Insights:

Regular Reporting: Create and maintain regular performance reports, dashboards, and presentations to track campaign progress, analyze performance trends, and showcase ROI. Present these findings in a clear, concise manner to clients and internal teams.

Actionable Insights: Translate complex data into actionable insights that drive campaign improvements. Provide clear, data-backed recommendations to both internal and client stakeholders to guide future PPC strategies and decisions.

Attribution & Conversion Tracking: Implement and manage proper tracking systems to measure campaign effectiveness and provide accurate reporting on conversions, revenue, and other key metrics.



Qualifications:

Education:

Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience). Certifications in Google Ads and Bing Ads are a plus.



Experience:

Proven PPC Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of hands-on experience managing PPC campaigns across Google Ads and Bing Ads. This includes experience in Google Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Bing Search campaigns.

Agency or Client Experience: Experience working in a client-facing role, ideally in a digital marketing agency, managing multiple PPC accounts with large-scale budgets.

Experience at Google (Bonus): Previous experience working at Google or within a Google Partner agency is highly desirable, particularly if you have in-depth knowledge of Google Ads best practices, new features, and insights from working directly with the platform.



Technical Skills:

Google Ads & Bing Ads Expertise: Advanced proficiency in managing campaigns across Google Ads and Bing Ads, including search, display, shopping, remarketing, and video campaigns.

Analytics Tools Proficiency: Strong working knowledge of Google Analytics, Microsoft Advertising Intelligence, Google Tag Manager, and other relevant analytics and tracking tools to measure, report, and optimize PPC campaign performance.

Data Interpretation: Ability to analyze large datasets, interpret complex data, and turn insights into actionable strategies to optimize campaign performance.



Soft Skills:

Excellent Communication & Presentation Skills: Ability to explain complex PPC strategies and performance data in a clear, concise, and accessible manner for clients, internal teams, and stakeholders.

Client Management Experience: Proven experience in building and nurturing strong client relationships. Ability to manage client expectations and resolve issues in a timely and professional manner.

Problem-Solving & Proactive Mindset: Strong problem-solving skills, with a proactive approach to identifying and addressing campaign issues. Ability to think critically and take strategic action based on data.

Attention to Detail: High attention to detail, ensuring that campaign elements are precise and accurately reflect client objectives, even when working with large volumes of data.



How to Apply:

If you’re an experienced PPC Manager looking for a new challenge, we want to hear from you! Please submit your resume, along with a cover letter outlining your relevant experience. Include any specific campaigns or achievements that highlight your expertise with Google Ads and Bing Ads.

title: PPC Manager (Google & Bing Ads)

title: SETTING CALLER - EARN $1,000-$1,500 PER WEEK (MALE VOICE ONLY)
description:
PLEASE READ THE "HOW TO APPLY" PART BEFORE SENDING A MESSAGE



THE OPPORTUNITY:

We're hiring full-time callers to contact existing clients about pre-funded trading accounts. You handle initial outreach via text and phone, then book them with our closer who finalizes the sale.

This is NOT cold calling. These are warm leads who already use our service and trust us.

Your job: Qualify interest, book the appointment. Our closers handle the pressure.



FINANCIAL COMPENSATION

Base salary $
per week + commission



YOUR DAILY WORKFLOW:

TEXTING (30% of your time):

Morning: Send outreach messages to existing clients about the pre-funded account offer Throughout day: Follow up with those who don't immediately reply After calls: Send booking confirmation texts and appointment reminders

You're using
 to contact warm leads (our existing bot users). These people know us and trust us. Response rates are high.

PHONING (70% of your time):

One call per interested prospect. Your goal: explain the offer briefly, qualify their interest, and book them for a call with our closer.

Average call length: 15 minutes. You are NOT closing the sale. You're setting the appointment. The closer handles all objections, pricing negotiations, and final sale.

Conversion rate: 40%+ of people you call end up buying.

This is extremely high because:

-They're already customers (warm audience)

-The offer is valuable

-It's an upsell (they already trust the main product)

-You follow a proven script



WHY THIS ROLE IS LOW PRESSURE:

- No cold calling (everyone knows us already)

- No closing (someone else handles that part)

- No rejection handling (closer deals with objections)

- Script provided (proven framework you follow)

- Warm leads (high response and conversion rates)

You're the bridge. You educate, qualify, and book. The closer does the heavy lifting.



WORK SCHEDULE:

Full-time: 40 hours per week Flexible within 9:00 AM to 11:00 PM CET (Central European Time) You choose your 8-hour window, but must have minimum 6 hours overlap with CET business hours

Example schedules that work:

3:00 PM - 11:00 PM Manila Time (9:00 AM - 5:00 PM CET)

4:00 PM - 12:00 AM Manila Time (10:00 AM - 6:00 PM CET)



NON-NEGOTIABLES (MUST HAVE ALL):

1. FLUENT O
 ENGLISH (Speaking + Writing) You'll be calling and texting international clients. Must be clearly understood on the phone. Fluency is required. We will test this with a voice/video sample.

2. FULL-TIME COMMITMENT This is a 40-hour/week role. No side jobs, no part-time. We need consistency and focus.

3. STABLE INTERNET CONNECTION No frequent disconnections. You'll be on calls and need reliability. Backup internet solution required (mobile data as backup).

4. QUIET, PROFESSIONAL WORKSPACE You need a dedicated space where you can make calls without background noise. No crying babies, traffic sounds, or interruptions during calls. Professional environment essential.

5. QUALITY PHONE + HEADSET Clear audio is critical. You need a reliable smartphone or computer with a microphone/headset that produces crystal-clear sound. We will test audio quality before hiring.

6. PROVEN PHONE EXPERIENCE We need someone who has done phone-based sales, customer service, or appointment setting before.



WHAT MAKES YOU STAND OUT:

Previous experience in high-ticket sales or financial services

Experience with WhatsApp Business,
, or CRM systems

Track record of 50%+ appointment show rates as a setter

Comfortable discussing trading, investing, or prop firms (we'll train you, but prior knowledge helps)

Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision

Organized and detail-oriented (tracking follow-ups, updating CRM)



HOW TO APPLY:

Send the following to us on 
 or on whatsapp at 
. VOICE SAMPLE (REQUIRED) Record a 90-second video or audio telling us:

Your name and location

Your phone sales experience (specific results/numbers)

Why you want this role

Why you think you'll be good at it

This tests your English fluency and communication skills. Applications without voice samples will be automatically rejected.



2. INFRASTRUCTURE CONFIRMATION Confirm you have:

- Stable internet (speed test screenshot)

- Quiet workspace (describe your setup)

- Quality phone/headset (brand/model)

- Backup internet solution



3. AVAILABILITY Confirm you can: ? Start within 7 days if selected ? Work full-time (40 hours/week) ? Overlap with CET business hours (9 AM - 11 PM CET window)



RED FLAGS (DON'T APPLY IF):

- You're not truly fluent in English (we will test this)

- You don't have a quiet workspace (background noise = instant disqualification)

- You have unreliable internet (we track call quality metrics)

- You're looking for part-time or side work (this is full-time only)

- You've never done phone sales before (we need proven experience)

- You can't commit to the CET time overlap requirement



WHY WORK WITH US:

- Warm leads only (no cold calling grind)

- High conversion rates (40% vs industry average of 5-10%)

- No closing pressure (you set, closer handles sale)

- Monthly bonuses with real chances to win (only 4 people competing)

- Possible base salary after 3 months (financial stability kicks in)

- Remote flexibility (work from anywhere in your timezone)

- Real support (weekly training, daily check-ins, not left alone)



FINAL NOTE:

This role rewards consistency and quality. Our top caller last month made $6,800. Our lowest made $3,200. We’re scaling fast and you can grow fast with us as well/

If you're methodical, coachable, and genuinely good on the phone, you'll thrive here. Contact us on
 
 or whatsapp at

title: Customer Success Representative
description:
Company: Nestflo

Nestflo, www.nestflo.ai,  is a leading provider of innovative SaaS solutions tailored for the estate agency industry. Nestflo AI-powered software automates lead generation, pre-qualification, and closing sales tasks for estate agencies. 

2. Job Description:

Nestflo, a cutting-edge property technology SaaS platform, is seeking a dedicated Customer Success Representative to ensure our clients achieve exceptional results with our solutions. You will be instrumental in helping real estate agencies streamline operations, enhance tenant experiences, and maximize the value of our software.

5. Benefits:

Competitive salary, $xxxx with commissions and a performance bonus.

Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm (UK time)

title: Premiere Pro Short-Form Video Editor (Reels/TikTok/Shorts) - Long-term
description:
Start Here (Pay + Setup)

 • We start part-time (20 hours/week)

 • Deliver 7 shorts/week (45–60s) in our exact style

 • Pay to start: $600/month

 • If performance is great (quality + speed + consistency), there is an opportunity to do more hours / to go full-time and take on more responsibility long-term.



---



This is NOT a generic captions job.



We edit in a clean, minimalistic, modern health style (Iman Gadzhi-ish).

Think: bold headlines, metric overlays (Whoop/EightSleep), simple animations, high retention pacing — not “cinematic documentary.”



Our Reference Style (Required)



Before applying, watch our examples here:



Reference Folder (copy/paste into browser): 

"
;



(Contains 2 of our own edited shorts + overlays/assets)



If you cannot match our style exactly, do not apply.

You must be very comfortable replicating this exact style.



---



What you will do

 • Edit 7 shorts/week (30–60s) from raw talking-head + b-roll

 • Hook-first editing (first 1 second must hit, first 3 seconds must be strong)

 • Add clean dynamic captions + word highlighting (not overdone)

 • Add metric overlays (Whoop/EightSleep screenshots), headline cards, simple animations

 • Use Canva for quick visual assets (rounded edges, frames, text cards) when needed

Expected delivery: 7 shorts/week, with daily progress updates and fast revisions (same day when needed).



Bonus (nice to have)

 • Thumbnail / cover design

 • Strong retention instincts



Requirements

 • Premiere Pro (required)

 • Canva (required)

 • Fast workstation + reliable internet

 • Great English comprehension & Fluency

 • Reliable delivery + fast revisions



---

You should be comfortable delivering consistently and revising quickly when needed.



---



IMPORTANT (Filter)



To apply, start your message with: "marko_editor"

Applications without this will be ignored.



In your application, include:

 1. Your best 3 short-form edits (accessible sharing links via Google Drive)

 2. 1 edit most similar to our reference style (required) (accessible sharing link via Google Drive)

 3. Confirm: Premiere Pro + Canva

 4. Your timezone + availability

title: AI Tool Researcher
description:
Company: BriarBear

Location: Fully Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Graveyard Shift (Start time between 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM PH Time)

Employment Type: Full-Time



About this Role

We are hiring an AI Tool Researcher to help our company stay at the forefront of the rapidly

evolving AI landscape. This role is equal parts researcher, power user, internal educator, and

productivity optimizer.

Your job is not just to read about AI tools—but to discover them early, test them deeply, and

translate their real-world value into practical use cases for our teams across product,

engineering, video, operations, and leadership.

AI is moving fast. New tools, agents, and workflows appear weekly. This role exists to make

sure we don’t fall behind—and more importantly, that we actually use what’s possible.

You will work closely with leadership on a daily basis and collaborate with teams across the

company to identify where AI can save time, improve quality, or unlock entirely new capabilities.



What You’ll Do

1. Discover New AI Tools & Products

? Actively research and track new AI tools, platforms, and startups across:

? AI chatbots and copilots

? AI agents and automation tools

? AI-powered SaaS products (e.g., research, negotiation, analytics, content,

operations)

? Monitor AI newsletters, communities, and launch platforms (e.g., AI Valley, AI

Breakfast, product launches, demos, social media, and forums).

? Identify tools early—before they become mainstream—and assess their relevance to

our business.

Example:

Discovering tools like new AI chatbots, AI-powered negotiation tools, AI research

assistants, or emerging agent frameworks and flagging them for internal use.

2. Hands-On Testing & Experimentation

? Personally use and test AI tools to understand:

? What they are actually capable of (not just marketing claims)

? Where they break

? What workflows they truly improve



? Explore advanced and creative use cases across areas such as:

? Research and analysis

? Product development and design

? Programming and technical workflows

? Video and content production

? Operations, HR, payroll, and internal processes

? Compare tools against each other and recommend the best option for specific

needs.

This role requires curiosity and experimentation. You are expected to “play,” test,

and push tools to their limits.

3. Internal Knowledge Sharing & Enablement

? Create clear, concise Loom videos, walkthroughs, and internal presentations

explaining:

? What the tool is

? Why it matters

? How we should use it

? Share findings with leadership and relevant teams in a way that is:

? Practical

? Actionable

? Easy to adopt

? Maintain internal documentation or tool libraries as needed.

Your goal is to translate complexity into clarity for the rest of the company.

4. Team Collaboration & Workflow Optimization

? Meet regularly with tea
mbers across:

? Product

? Engineering

? Video / Creative

? Operations

? Leadership

? Understand what each team is doing today and identify:

? Where AI could speed things up

? Where AI could improve quality

? Where AI could enable entirely new workflows

? Recommend specific tools, agents, or processes tailored to each role.



Example:

Helping video editors discover better AI UGC tools, helping engineers explore new

coding or agent-based workflows, or helping operations teams automate spreadsheets

and reporting.

5. AI Agents & Future-Facing Workflows

? Research and experiment with AI agents and multi-step automation.

? Explore how AI agents could be used for:

? Research

? Product iteration

? Operations

? Internal tooling

? Help leadership think strategically about how AI should be embedded into how we

build products and run the company.



Who You Are

? Extremely curious and self-directed

? Comfortable learning new tools constantly

? Excited by experimentation, not intimidated by incomplete documentation

? Able to explain technical or complex concepts in simple terms

? Organized enough to track findings, tools, and recommendations

? Comfortable working closely with leadership

? Strong written and verbal English communication skills



Required Skills & Experience

? Strong interest in AI, automation, and emerging technology

? Experience using modern AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude/Opus, copilots, AI

SaaS tools)

? Ability to research independently and synthesize insights

? Experience creating Loom videos, demos, or internal presentations (or willingness to

learn quickly)

? Comfortable working a graveyard shift aligned with US-based teams



Nice to Have (But Not Required)

? Background in product, research, operations, engineering, or content

? Experience testing beta products or early-stage tools

? Familiarity with AI agents, automation platforms, or no-code tools

? Experience working with distributed or remote teams



Why This Role Matters

This role directly impacts:

? Company productivity

? Product quality

? Speed of execution

? Competitive advantage

AI is no longer optional. The AI Tool Researcher ensures we are not just aware of what’s

happening—but actively leveraging it.

title: Systems Coordinator
description:
Position Overview:  



The Systems Coordinator is responsible for creating, managing, and troubleshooting automation workflows in GoHighLevel (GHL) to support efficient operations across the company. This role requires at least one year of hands-on experience in GHL or a similar automation platform, along with strong analytical and problem-solving skills. In addition to system automation, this person will assist the Admin Operations Team with various ad hoc tasks and continuously seek opportunities to optimize workflows, eliminate inefficiencies, and enhance team productivity. 



 



Pay Range: $8 per hourwith a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 



About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems, LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 



Objectives: 



Build, maintain, and troubleshoot automation workflows in GoHighLevel to support streamlined operations. 



Monitor performance of active automations to ensure accuracy, functionality, and timely resolution of system issues. 



Work closely with the Operations Manager to understand workflow needs and translate them into effective and efficient automations, while coordinating with Admin Operations and other departments as needed. 



Identify inefficiencies in current processes and proactively recommend workflow improvements. 



Assist the Admin Operations Team with various administrative and operational tasks, ensuring smooth day-to-day operations. 



Troubleshoot and resolve Admin Operations Help Tickets with a customer-service–focused approach. 



Manage and update pipelines, triggers, automations, forms, and integrations as needed. 



Ensure all GHL data, workflows, and configurations are maintained accurately and consistently. 



 



Competencies: 



Strong understanding of automation logic, workflows, and pipeline management.

title: Project Management Associate
description:
ABOUT OPTOGROW



Optogrow empowers digital agencies with business process automation and system optimization solutions designed to streamline operations, save time, reduce costs, and accelerate growth.



We help agencies eliminate manual inefficiencies and create structured, scalable systems using tools like GoHighLevel, integrations, and customized automation workflows.



At Optogrow, we operate with disciplined execution, transparent communication, and measurable accountability — providing a balanced blend of technical expertise and operational clarity that enables our clients to focus on strategic growth.



ROLE OVERVIEW



The Project Management Associate is responsible for delivery governance, task visibility, SLA monitoring, and internal User Acceptance Testing (UAT).



This role ensures that work moves through the pipeline clearly, risks are surfaced early, and no task falls through the cracks.



This is not a technical architecture role and not an operations supervisor role. It is a governance and quality assurance role focused on protecting delivery standards and preventing silent failures.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Project & Task Governance (ClickUp Ownership)

- Ensure all client-related tasks are logged in ClickUp

- Enforce task hygiene (owner, due date, description, acceptance criteria)

- Monitor overdue tasks and aging items

- Follow up on stalled or blocked work

- Maintain delivery visibility across clusters

- Prepare weekly internal task status summaries

- Prevent tasks from living only in chat or memory



2. SLA Monitoring & Risk Escalation

- Monitor response and completion SLAs

- Identify patterns of delay or instability

- Flag at-risk deliverables before client escalation

- Escalate governance risks to the Lead Tech Architect when necessary

- Maintain a monthly delivery risk report



3. User Acceptance Testing (UAT)

- Perform internal UAT before client exposure

- Validate deliverables against defined acceptance criteria

- Document discrepancies between expected vs. actual behavior

- Return work to Tech Leads when UAT criteria are not met

- Track UAT rejection frequency and patterns

- Support refinement of UAT checklists and testing procedures



Note: The PM Associate validates business workflow outcomes, not architecture design decisions.



4. Cluster Visibility & Reporting

- Attend weekly cluster review meetings (observer/reporting role)

- Track cluster performance indicators (overdue rate, UAT rejection trends, escalation frequency)

- Provide visibility dashboards to leadership

- Surface recurring risks early



5. Governance Compliance Enforcement

- Ensure no work begins without proper task logging

- Reinforce non-negotiable operational rules

- Identify repeated process violations

- Support structural stability through disciplined enforcement



Required Qualifications

- 2–5 years of experience in project coordination or project management

- Strong familiarity with task management tools (ClickUp preferred)

- Experience in a digital agency, SaaS, automation, or tech environment preferred

- High attention to detail

- Strong documentation and reporting skills

- Comfortable enforcing process without being confrontational

- Ability to identify risk patterns early



Core Competencies

- Structured thinking

- High accountability

- Process discipline

- Calm under pressure

- Clear written communication

- Independent problem-solving

- Risk awareness

title: OBM / Research & Operations Specialist

We are a fast-moving operational team managing multiple businesses, including a construction company and a professional services firm. Our work is detail-heavy, deadline-driven, and requires someone who thrives on organization, persistence, and problem-solving.



The Role



We don't just want a Virtual Assistant. We want "The Boss." We like to operate like our virtual assistants are in full control, they tell us what we're supposed to be doing and when!



This role involves managing project boards, bids, and client communications, while ensuring everyone remains accountable. You'll manage complex processes, direct people to deliver what you need, conduct in-depth research, and drive the business forward with strong written communication.



You don't need construction or government contracting experience (although it's a great plus)—we'll train you on the specifics. What we care about most is your confidence, research abilities, exceptional English writing skills, and persistence.



What We're Looking For



Must-Have Skills:



Exceptional English writing and communication skills (both written and verbal)

Strong research abilities - you can dig deep into details and synthesize information

Comfortable on the phone - calling procurement officers, clients, vendors, or tea
mbers

Confident enough to step in, learn, ask questions, and then manage

Detail-oriented and methodical in your approach

Proactive action-taker - we cannot babysit

Strong communicator - you ask questions when needed (we can't read minds!)

Relentless follow-up skills (yes, even if it means being "annoying")

Comfortable giving direction and holding others accountable

Tech-savvy and able to learn new systems quickly (especially ClickUp)

Not afraid to be wrong and course-correct quickly

Someone we can trust long-term



Bonus Points:



Experience with online business management (OBM)

Familiarity with
 systems, CRMs, Pipeline Management, Research, AI

Background in business operations, project coordination, or virtual assistance

Experience in construction or government contracting (we'll train you, we know this is super rare!)



What We are NOT Looking For



NOT looking for - Just a social media manager (there are some social media tasks, but we need a STRONG ADMIN)

NOT looking for - Someone who has only managed
s

NOT looking for - Someone who needs constant supervision

NOT looking for - Someone who won't ask questions when they need clarity



What You'll Do

Core Responsibilities:



Manage clients and report back to leadership

Conduct extensive research on bid opportunities, requirements, regulations, and industry details

Write and prepare professional documents including bid proposals, reports, meeting agendas, and correspondence

Manage and coordinate the bid process for federal and local construction contracts

Gather, organize, and prepare bid documents (templates, forms, compliance paperwork)

Create meeting agendas and presentation materials for tea
etings

Manage and prioritize daily
 correspondence to ensure timely, professional responses

Handle incoming calls with polite and professional assistance

Track deadlines for all projects and keep the team accountable to deliver on time

Communicate with vendors, subcontractors, and internal tea
mbers to collect needed information

Utilize ClickUp to track tasks, manage projects, and maintain documentation

Schedule appointments, manage calendars, and organize meetings

Keep systems, files, and tasks organized in our project management systems

Handle administrative tasks and special projects as needed

Be willing to take on new challenges and learn new skills



We Will Happily Train You On



Government bid preparation and compliance requirements

Construction industry terms and processes

Our internal systems and workflows

Specific tools and platforms we use



Why Join Us



You'll be the one who runs the show with this company

Be part of a small but growing team where your work has direct impact

Gain experience in federal and local contracting

Learn high-level business operations and leadership skills

Growth opportunities as we expand

Work with a team that values your intelligence and initiative



Job Details



Position: Virtual Assistant - Administrative & Research Specialist (Full-time)

Hours: EST time zone (REQUIRED)

Location: Remote

Compensation: Based on experience and demonstrated skills



30-Day Paid Probationary Period: After your first 30 days, we'll evaluate if this is a good fit for both sides. We don't expect you to overwork during this time, we just want to make sure you're a good fit for the team and that you like working with us!



How to Apply

Click the link (we will only be reviewing applications with the Normal, blue priority)

Salary paid monthly + 13th Month + vacation days

title: Customer Experience & Risk Associate (E-commerce Backend Role)
description:
We are a growing fashion e-commerce brand looking for a long-term tea
mber to manage backend operations and customer experience.



This is not just a support role. You will protect revenue, prevent chargebacks, and oversee order flow from purchase to delivery.



Role Overview



You will manage three connected areas:



- Customer Support



- Chargebacks & Risk Management



- Fulfillment & Order Monitoring



These areas are directly connected. A delayed order can turn into a refund request. A poorly handled refund can turn into a chargeback. You will oversee the entire chain.



Responsibilities



1. Customer Support



- Respond to all
s within 24 hours (goal: same day)

- Maintain a calm and professional tone

- Apply refund processes correctly

- Identify repeat issues and report patterns

- Escalate sensitive cases when necessary



2. Risk & Chargeback Management



- Monitor chargeback alerts daily

- Review high-risk orders

- Issue proactive refunds when necessary

- Collect and submit dispute evidence

- Maintain a weekly risk report

- Prevention is more important than simply winning disputes.



3. Fulfillment & Order Monitoring



- Monitor orders in Shopify

- Check tracking updates daily

- Identify delayed or stuck shipments

- Contact ur supplier directly

- Flag suspicious orders and contact supplier

- Ensure on-time fulfillment



Work Schedule



- 6 days per week

Some days: 2–3 hours

Other days: 7–8 hours



Workload is currently variable



As we scale, the role may become more structured. If volume increases significantly, we will hire additional support.



Growth Opportunity



This role can grow into:

- Backend Operations Manager



You will become the first person who fully understands our backend systems.



Requirements



- Excellent written English

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to work independently

- Shopify experience (preferred)

- Customer support experience (preferred)

- Chargeback or dispute experience (strong plus)

- Calm, solution-focused mindset

- High ownership mentality



Application Instructions



To be considered, please include:



1. A short written introduction

2. Your relevant experience

3. A 1-minute video introducing yourself



In the video, briefly explain:



- Who you are

- Your experience

- Why you are a good fit for this role



Applications without a video will not be considered.
