title: AI Video Editor — Short-Form Ads (Full-Time, 40 hrs/week)
description:
About the Role

We are a fast-growing US-based health supplement brand running paid ads on Meta 
 & Instagram). We need a full-time AI Video Editor who can produce high volumes of short-form video ads daily.

This is NOT a traditional video editing job. You will be working almost entirely with AI tools to create content that looks native, raw, and real — not polished or branded.

If you don't already use AI video tools every day, this is not the right role.

What You'll Be Doing



Producing 3–5+ short-form video ads per day using AI tools

Creating AI UGC-style ads (talking heads, testimonials, "real person" narratives using AI avatars and voice cloning)

Building AI podcast-style clips (two AI hosts discussing health topics in a natural conversational format)

Editing short-form VSLs (60–90 seconds, punchy, with text overlays and strong hooks)

Creating raw, native-looking "scroll-stop" video content that blends into social feeds — ugly on purpose, not polished

Iterating fast — when something works, you make 3–5 variations of it same day

Working from scripts and creative briefs provided by the founder

Exporting in correct Meta specs (1:1, 4:5, 9:16)



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



You MUST have previous experience editing video ads for a supplement or health/wellness brand. If you haven't worked in this space before, please do not apply.

Expert-level proficiency with AI video tools — Sora, Runway, Kling, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Synthesia, or similar. You should be using these daily already.

Experience creating AI UGC content — AI-generated talking heads that look and sound natural on social media.

Experience creating AI podcast-style video content.

You understand direct response advertising — you know what a hook is, why the first 3 seconds matter, and how to structure a video that sells.

Speed and volume. Multiple finished videos per day without sacrificing the raw, native quality we need.



Nice to Have



Experience with AI image generation tools (Midjourney, OpenArt, etc.)

Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager

Basic understanding of copywriting

Experience with CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or Premiere Pro



Compensation



$5/hour, 40 hours/week ($200/week)

Paid weekly via Wise or PayPal

Long-term position — this is not a one-off project

Performance bonuses and pay increases as we scale



How to Apply

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the word "BISON."

Then include:



A short intro about yourself and your experience with AI video tools

Links to 2–3 AI UGC or AI podcast videos you've created

Which AI tools you use daily

Your previous supplement/health brand experience

Your timezone and availability



Applications without "BISON" at the top or without portfolio links will not be reviewed.

title: Marketing Manager / Research Manager – Viral Content & Social Media Growth
description:
We Create Videos That Hit 1M+ Views. Now We Need the Person Who Finds Them.



We're a UGC management agency that builds massive reach on Instagram and TikTok. Our content regularly crosses 1 million views. We manage multiple UGC creators, handle their entire marketing strategy, and we're scaling fast.



We're hiring a Marketing Manager who lives and breathes short-form content, someone who spots trends before they peak, understands why certain videos explode, and can turn that insight into actionable content strategies for our creators.



This is not a VA role. This is a strategic position with real ownership and a clear path to growth.



---



YOUR ROLE



? Research trending content, sounds, and formats on TikTok and Instagram Reels — before they go mainstream

? Identify viral video patterns and translate them into content ideas our creators can use

? Develop weekly content strategies based on real-time platform data

? Collaborate with our content and creative team to refine scripts and concepts

? Track content performance and report on what's working (and what's not)

? Monitor algorithm changes and platform updates that affect reach



---



WHO YOU ARE



? You scroll TikTok and Reels obsessively — and you can explain WHY certain videos go viral

? You have experience in social media marketing, content strategy, or digital marketing

? You're fluent in English (C1+) — written and spoken

? You're self-motivated, reliable, and take ownership without being micromanaged

? You have a stable internet connection (100+ Mbps)



---



WHAT YOU'LL EARN



Starting Base: $500–$600/month

Performance Bonus: Up to $300/month for viral content wins

6-Month Target: $800–$1,000/month for top performers

Growth Path: Senior Marketing Manager role as we scale

$1000+/month easily possible within the first few months thanks to our bonus system



We pay for results. If you consistently deliver viral content strategies, your compensation grows with your impact. No cap on performance bonuses.



---



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



? You're not posting content for a random brand — you're shaping the strategy for creators who already get millions of views

? You'll work directly with an experienced marketer who'll help you level up fast

? Flexible hours — we care about output, not hours logged

? Real growth opportunity: we're building a team, and early hires get the most responsibility



---



HOW TO APPLY



Step 1: Fill out our application form:






We review every application within 48 hours.



---



We don't hire resumes. We hire people who see what others miss.

title: US Senior TikTok Shop Affiliate Manager (Only experienced)
description:
[About the Role]

We are a premium K-Beauty brand specializing in professional aesthetic and anti-aging skincare (Wrinkle Tox 5D Shot). We are looking for a high-performing TikTok Shop Affiliate Outreach Manager to scale our US presence. The ideal candidate has a proven track record of identifying top-tier skincare influencers and driving significant revenue through strategic partnerships.



[Key Responsibilities]



- Massive Outreach & Discovery:** Identify and reach out to 2,000+ targeted skincare influencers per month.

- Precise Targeting:** Focus on influencers within the skincare/beauty niche who have generated over $5,000 in revenue in the last 30 days.

- End-to-End Communication:** Manage all communications via TikTok DM,
, and SNS. Craft personalized, high-converting invitation messages.

- Creative Guidance: Provide influencers with "Creative Hooks" and "Visual Guides" to ensure their content aligns with our premium aesthetic image and drives sales.

- Post Management: Monitor sample delivery, track upload status, and proactively encourage influencers to post high-quality content on time.

- Reporting: Maintain a daily/weekly tracker of outreach volume, response rates, and GMV performance.



[Qualifications]



- Experience:Minimum 1-2 years of direct experience in US TikTok Shop Affiliate management (Experience in the beauty/skincare industry is a huge plus).

- Full-Time Commitment: Ability to work 8 hours a day (aligned with US or KST time zone as discussed).

- Communication: Native-level written English with the ability to build rapport with influencers.

- Data-Driven: Proficient in TikTok analytics tools (e.g., KaloData, FastMoss, EchoTik).

- Proactive Attitude: A self-starter who doesn't just "send messages" but "closes deals" and drives revenue.



[Performance Bonus & Perks]



- Competitive base salary.

- Performance-based Incentives: Additional bonuses for reaching GMV targets and high-performing video uploads.

- Opportunity to lead our expansion into the Southeast Asian (SEA) TikTok Shops for top performers.

title: Affiliate & Outreach Manager / Social Media
description:
We are looking for a proactive and organized professional to manage and grow our influencer and affiliate network.



This is a growth role. You must have previous experience managing creators, partnerships, or outreach and be able to demonstrate results. We are not looking for someone to simply complete tasks. We want someone who already has a system that works and can help us scale.



Main Responsibilities



You will maintain and manage a database of partners, track posting activity and performance, follow up to ensure content commitments are met, and identify top performers and growth opportunities.



You will monitor Instagram and TikTok for partner content, download and organize media in Google Drive, and label and categorize content so it can be used for marketing.



You will identify and research potential partners, initiate outreach to creators and collaborators, and support campaigns, collaborations, and giveaways.



You will coordinate partner logistics by creating orders when needed, tracking deliveries, and confirming content posting.



Requirements (Non-negotiable)



You must have proven experience managing influencers, affiliates, or outreach and be able to show real results. You must be proactive and self-directed, with the ability to work independently without constant supervision. You must have a workflow or system you have successfully used before. You must understand Instagram and TikTok trends and culture. Strong organization skills and clear written English are required.



This role is not for you if you wait for instructions, do the minimum required, lack experience managing creators, or struggle with organization and follow-through.



Application Requirements



To be considered, include examples of campaigns, creators, or partnerships you have managed, the results you helped achieve, the system or workflow you used, and the tools you rely on to stay organized.

title: AUDIT SPECIALIST
description:

Department: Audit & Sales Operations

Location: Remote





Position Summary

We are seeking a detail-oriented, reliable, and systems-savvy Audit Specialist to join our fast-paced, mission-driven Audit and Sales Operations team. This role is critical in ensuring accuracy, consistency, and accountability across sales and challenge-related activities. As an integral part of the back-end operations, you will conduct daily audits, maintain CRM hygiene, support process improvement, and enable smooth communication and tracking within the Sales ecosystem.





Key Responsibilities:

Sales Support & Auditing

Provide back-end operational support to the Sales Team during Challenges and Events.

Review agreements/contracts to ensure they are accurately sent, signed, and complete.

Verify and update the status of funding applications, agreements, and transactions.



CRM & Data Integrity (GoHighLevel, PhoneBurner, Google Sheets):

Audit CRM (GoHighLevel) for duplicate entries, incorrect contact info, missing tags, and data inconsistencies.

Ensure sales appointments are correctly logged, tagged, and assigned to the appropriate tea
mbers.

Audit undispositioned appointments and ping reps to update appointment outcomes

Identify and merge duplicate contacts to maintain clean data records.



Sales Pipeline & KPI Monitoring:

Review sales pipelines to ensure leads are in the correct stage.

Monitor the status of pending leads, update lead information, and verify lead ownership.

Record, review, and report on Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) submitted by the Sales Team.



Documentation & Reporting:

Maintain and update Audit Sheets, Running Sales Commissions Sheets, Sales Stats Sheets, and Ticket Sales Sheets.

Generate and share daily reports on stats, top performers, rankings, and cash collections to Slack channels.

Design and maintain checklists, trackers, and templates for process standardization.



Automation & Systems Management:

Build/test automations using Zapier to streamline processes like Google Form to Slack integrations.

Set up and manage user accounts for Sales, Challenge, and Audit teams in Slack, GHL, and
 systems.

Create and update Google Forms for data collection related to ticket sales, upgrades, and challenges.

Modify calendars and Smartlists in GHL for scheduling and segmentation.



Communication & Team Collaboration:

Set up dedicated Slack channels for challenge communications and sales discussions.

Attend regular meetings with the Audit Team, Bookkeeping Team, and other stakeholders.

Tag or remind Sales Reps to follow up with leads or update CRM records.

Generate unique payment links, cancel/resend agreements, and ensure proper financial documentation.





Preferred Systems Knowledge:

GoHighLevel (GHL)

PhoneBurner

Zapier

Google Suite (Sheets, Forms, Calendar, Gmail)

Slack

ClickUp





Key Qualities & Skills:

High attention to detail and organizational skills

Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities

Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities in a fast-paced environment

Clear communication and a team-player mindset

Proactive and process-oriented with a continuous improvement attitude

Comfortable working across various time zones and collaborating virtually

title: Social Media Manager with the right feeling
description:
Finding the right social media manager is difficult.

Someone who will use all our knowledge and experience of our program and our target audience and combine them with their experience and talent.



Plenty of people respond to my ads, but it’s hard to find that one right person. That person with the right skills, the right insights, and the right feeling for what we do.



Social media is a complex discipline. You learn this by understanding the specific market and target audience, by working with results and numbers, and by analyzing what worked and what didn’t. To start all over again tomorrow, because the algorithms have changed.



A feeling for what we are doing is important. Also talent in authentic writing, talent to make visuals that stand out, a good feeling for the different platforms, the ability to see what to post, when and where, and to monitor the results of your posts. This is where a certain talent comes in.



We are looking for a social media manager who fits this description.

The position is for 20 hours a week, including some tasks on weekends.

You can work from home and mostly plan your own working hours.



About us:

Arcticterns.global is a non profit foundation that creates gatherings for traveling families to build community they often miss because of their lifestyle. We host month long programs in different countries, where families come together, connect, learn, and grow. Community is at the heart of everything we do.



Interested?

- Please send a cover letter in which you explain why you are interested and the skills that make you a strong fit for this role. Please make sure your authentic writing skills show in the cover letter and do not use AI.

- Please include samples of your work that touch the above description

- Please complete the IQ test and the DISC test this platform offers.

- Please include your salary range in PHP for the 20 hour job

title: Part-Time Video Editor for Australian Marketing Agency (Meta Ads & Tradie Content)
description:
About Us



ScaleUp Labz is an Australian marketing agency based in Sydney. We help roofing, construction, HVAC, and home improvement businesses generate exclusive qualified leads through
 and Google Ads.



We are not a generic agency.



Our clients are tradies doing serious revenue numbers. Many of them go from $30K per month to $150K+ per month when campaigns are dialled in. Our creatives need to reflect that level of professionalism and performance.



We run paid ads, manage CRM systems through GoHighLevel, and produce high converting short form content for Meta platforms.



We are now looking for a part-time video editor to help us create high performing ad creatives and social media project content.



- Role Overview



You will be responsible for editing:



•
 and Instagram ad creatives

• Client project highlight videos

• Before and after transformations

• Short form reels (15 to 60 seconds)

• Testimonial style videos

• Performance driven direct response creatives



This is not just basic editing. We need someone who understands how to edit for conversions.



- What You’ll Be Editing



Most of our clients are:



• Roofing companies

• Tree removal companies

• HVAC companies

• Waterproofing and construction businesses



You’ll be turning:



• Raw job site footage

• Drone footage

• Client testimonial clips

• Before and after photos

• Voiceover scripts

• Hook based ad scripts



Into clean, high converting ads that stop the scroll.



- What We’re Looking For



You must:



• Have strong experience editing short form content

• Understand pacing and hooks for paid ads

• Be able to add captions professionally

• Know how to structure videos for retention

• Be comfortable editing 9:16 and 1:1 formats

• Have experience with CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar

• Have good English comprehension



Bonus if you:



• Understand direct response marketing

• Have edited ads for service businesses before

• Know basic motion graphics

• Understand Meta ad creative structure



- Performance Expectations



We are a performance driven agency.



Your edits will directly impact:



• Cost per lead

• Conversion rates

• Revenue generated for clients



We test creatives aggressively, so speed and adaptability are important.



You will be working directly with Anthony (Founder) and our internal team.



- Hours & Structure



• Part time

• 10 to 20 hours per week to start

• Opportunity to grow into full time

• Flexible schedule but must meet deadlines



- Pay



Competitive hourly rate based on experience.



Please include your expected hourly rate in your application.



- How To Apply



To be considered, please:



1. Send 3 to 5 examples of video edits you’ve done (ads preferred)

2. Record a short 1 to 2 minute Loom introducing yourself

3. Tell us what makes a good
 ad creative in your opinion

4. Confirm your hourly rate



Applications without video samples will not be reviewed.



If you are hungry, creative, and want to work with an agency scaling serious Australian businesses, we would love to hear from you.



Anthony

Founder

ScaleUp Labz

description:

This shows that you have read the job description.



All wages will be paid monthly via Wise, bank details or G cash.

title: Executive Operating Partner to CEO/Chairman - $1,800-2,200 USD Monthly
description:
International CEO/Chairman (Pakistan-based, global business operations) seeks elite Executive Assistant to function as strategic operating partner.



THIS IS NOT A STANDARD VIRTUAL ASSISTANT ROLE



You will directly support a CEO/Chairman managing international business interests. You operate with significant autonomy, anticipate executive needs, solve problems proactively, and function as an extension of the CEO's strategic capacity.

AI-Native Workflows: Daily ChatGPT usage, automation platforms (Zapier, Make, Notion), advanced research methodologies

Strategic Mindset: You identify problems and present solutions, not wait for task assignments

Research Excellence: Complex research and synthesis capability for strategic decision-making

Global Operations: Multi-timezone coordination, irregular working hours, high-pressure situations

Communication: Native-level English, professional executive communication standards



Compensation Structure:



Base Salary: $1,800-2,200 monthly based on demonstrated elite capability

Payment Method: Direct via Wise/PayPal, no agency intermediaries

Growth Opportunity: Long-term strategic partnership with expanding responsibilities

Performance Incentives: Merit-based increases for exceptional execution



MANDATORY APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS:



1. Executive Experience Documentation: Resume detailing CEO/Chairman support experience with measurable outcomes and achievement examples.



2. Video Capability Assessment (5 minutes maximum):

Record responses to these scenarios:



-Strategic Challenge: Describe the most complex strategic project you managed for a CEO/Chairman, including obstacles overcome and results achieved

-Crisis Management: Walk through your approach to handling urgent, multi-stakeholder coordination under time pressure

Motivation: Why are you seeking a new executive partnership opportunity?

Deliverable Requirements:

Include 3 specific opportunity areas with risk assessments

Document your AI tool usage methodology (which tools, how used, efficiency gains)

Cite authoritative sources with verification links

title: Head of Delivery – Web & Marketing (Remote, Leadership Role)
description:
Immediate Start | Remote | 30–40 Hours per Week



We are hiring a Head of Delivery to take full ownership of our web and multi-channel marketing delivery operations in the fast-moving legal industry.



This is a senior leadership role. You will be responsible for protecting delivery quality, client satisfaction, timelines, and team performance — while freeing the founder from day-to-day operational oversight.



This is not a task management role.

This is an ownership role.



Mission of the Role

Own all client delivery across the organisation and ensure projects are delivered on time, on budget, and at the highest quality — while leading and developing our remote delivery team. You will act as the operational shield between clients and the founder.



Key Responsibilities



1. Delivery Ownership

• Full accountability for all web builds and marketing delivery projects

• Ensure timelines, budgets, and quality standards are consistently met

• Proactively identify risks and resolve them before they escalate

• Protect margin by controlling scope and resourcing



2. Client Leadership

• Primary delivery point of contact for clients

• Lead client calls and provide strategic delivery updates

• Manage expectations and handle difficult conversations professionally

• De-escalate issues independently without founder involvement



3. Team Leadership

• Lead and manage:

 • Delivery Manager

 • Project Coordinators

 • Designers, Developers, Media Buyers, Writers

• Run weekly sprint planning and delivery meetings

• Enforce accountability across the team

• Improve delivery standards and processes



4. Operational Systems

• Oversee Agile sprint management and backlog prioritisation

• Forecast team capacity 30–60 days in advance

• Improve onboarding, QA, and reporting processes

• Build documentation and delivery playbooks



5. Reporting & Performance

• Provide weekly delivery dashboard including:

 • Client health

 • Timeline adherence

 • Capacity utilisation

 • Margin visibility

 • Risks & escalations



You own delivery performance.



Required Experience

• 6+ years managing complex web and digital marketing delivery

• Proven experience leading remote, multi-disciplinary teams

• Experience being the primary client-facing delivery lead

• Strong commercial awareness — understands margin, scope control, and resource allocation

• Comfortable pushing back on clients when required



Technical Literacy (Essential)

You must understand how digital systems work under the hood, including:

• Website architecture, CMS, hosting, APIs, integrations

• QA processes, staging vs production environments

• Deployment workflows and troubleshooting

• Paid ads funnels, tracking pixels, CRM workflows

• Multi-channel marketing systems



You do not need to code — but you must understand the mechanics.



Tools

• Asana / Jira / Trello / similar PM systems

• Slack / Zoom

• CRM & marketing automation platforms

• Reporting dashboards



Remote Leadership Requirements

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Confident leading calls with senior stakeholders

• Proven track record leading distributed teams across time zones



Ideal Candidate Profile



You are:

• Calm under pressure

• Highly accountable

• Decisive

• Commercially aware

• Process-driven

• Not afraid to have difficult conversations

• Comfortable taking ownership



You are someone who thrives in responsibility.



Why Join Us

• High-impact, fast-growth environment

• Opportunity to build and lead a delivery division

• Work at the intersection of marketing, technology, and legal sectors.

• Long-term growth and leadership progression



Compensation

• Competitive hourly rate based on experience

• 30–40 hours per week

• Long-term opportunity for leadership expansion



How to Apply



Please send:

• Your CV (PDF format)

• A short note explaining why you are suited for a Head of Delivery role

• (Optional) 1-minute Loom video introducing yourself



Applications that do not follow instructions will not progress.



References

We conduct reference checks for all tea
mbers prior to hiring.

title: Join Us as an Automation All-Rounder – Remote, 3+ Years in GHL
description:
Love building smart workflows—and writing the messages that make them work? Join us as our Automation All-Rounder and help people glide from first touch to happy outcome.



---



Job Title: Automation All-Rounder

Terms: Part-Time, Remote (10 AM to 2 PM GMT or variable)

Salary/Rate: $10-15USD per hour (based on experience)

Client Location: United Kingdom



---



About the Role



We’re hiring a hands-on Automation All-Rounder who can both build workflows and write the message copy that powers them. You’ll create and maintain automations, fix issues fast, and craft clear, on-brand messages for
/SMS/chat so contacts move through each step smoothly.



You’ll work closely with operations, project managers, and data teams to keep processes efficient, responsive, and measurable.



---



Key Responsibilities



1. Workflow & Automation Build



* Design, implement, and maintain workflows, pipelines, triggers, and integrations.

* Create mini-flows to move people into the correct stage without triggering the wrong messages.

* Connect tools (e.g., CRM ? spreadsheets ? automation platforms) to remove manual steps.



2. Copywriting for Message Flows



* Write concise, user-friendly copy for
s/SMS/in-app messages across the lifecycle (nurture, chasers, re-engagement, confirmations, etc.).

* Produce A/B variants, adapt tone for different audiences, and ensure compliance (opt-out lines, sender IDs, timing).



3. Responsive Troubleshooting



* Act as the go-to person for automation issues that need quick fixes.

* Monitor error queues and tags/fields, diagnose problems, and implement hotfixes with clear documentation.



4. Segmentation, Targeting & Ops



* Set up segments, tags, and custom fields to ensure the right people get the right messages.

* Coordinate handoffs between teams and systems; ensure accurate attribution/UTMs where relevant.



5. QA, Testing & Reporting



* Run end-to-end tests before launch; keep a simple QA checklist.

* Track key results and share clear updates; iterate based on data.



6. Documentation & Enablement



* Document flows (brief diagrams, notes, and Looms).

* Provide quick “how-to” tips so teammates can self-serve simple tasks.



---



Requirements



* Experience: At least 3+ years of hands-on experience with HighLevel (workflows, campaigns, pipelines, forms/calendars, triggers,
/SMS).

* Copywriting: Strong UK-English writing skills; able to craft short, clear, persuasive messages for automation.

* Technical Skills: Comfortable with logic, conditions, and field/tag management; basic webhook/API knowledge is a plus.

* Tools: HighLevel (required). Familiarity with Zapier/Make, Google Sheets/Excel, and analytics dashboards is a plus.

* Communication: Clear written and spoken English; confident on camera for quick Looms.

* Work Hours: 3–4 hours flexible per day, ideally 10 AM–2 PM GMT (Philippines Time: 6 PM–10 PM).

* Tech Requirements: Stable internet, laptop/computer, quiet workspace.



---



What We Offer



* Flexible part-time hours (4 hours/day).

* Competitive pay $10 - 15 USD/hour, based on experience.

* Work with a collaborative international team.

* Room to grow into broader marketing automation responsibilities.



---



How to Apply



Please send your CV and a short note explaining why this role suits you here: 
/4fh71Yt



* Include your CV as a PDF

* Add a covering message explaining why you’re a great fit

* Bonus: a 1–2 minute Loom introducing yourself and a quick overview of an automation you’ve built



***** Please follow these instructions, or your application will not progress *****



---



PLEASE NOTE: REFERENCES

We always take references on every new tea
mber before they join, so only apply if you can provide up to three professional references. No exceptions.

Key Responsibilities

	•	Agile Delivery – Run projects using Agile sprints, managing backlogs, ceremonies, and retrospectives while protecting delivery against scope creep.

	•	Technical Understanding – Be able to discuss the nuts and bolts of web development and marketing delivery, including:

	     •	Website architecture, CMS, hosting, APIs, and integrations

	     •	QA processes, staging vs. production environments, deployment pipelines

	     •	Marketing funnels, tracking pixels, ad platform integrations, and CRM workflows

	•	Multi-Disciplinary Team Management – Lead designers, developers, marketers, and compliance experts across time zones.

	•	Risk & Compliance Management – Anticipate risks, manage scope changes, and ensure projects meet compliance requirements (data handling, claimant onboarding standards).

	•	Client & Stakeholder Communication – Provide clear, proactive updates and manage expectations at every stage.



Requirements

	•	Proven Experience – 5+ years managing complex digital/web projects with multiple stakeholders and moving parts. Experience in legal, regulated, or compliance-heavy environments is a plus.

	•	Agile Expertise – Solid working knowledge of Agile (Scrum/Kanban). Ability to coach teams in Agile practices.

	•	Technical Literacy – Must understand how websites and digital marketing systems work under the hood (not just from a PM perspective). You don’t need to code, but you must know the difference between front-end/back-end tasks, QA issues, API calls, DNS/SSL settings, and how ad/CRM systems integrate.

	•	Tools – Strong proficiency with a PM tool like Asana, Jira, Trello, Basecamp, plus communication tools (Zoom, Slack/Teams).

	•	Excellent English – Fluent in reading, writing, and speaking. Must be comfortable in client-facing roles.

	•	Remote Leadership – Successful track record leading distributed teams and delivering results across multiple time zones.



Nice to Have

	•	Background in legal tech, class action law, or claimant acquisition campaigns.

	•	Familiarity with marketing automation, CRM-driven funnels, and compliance processes (KYC/AML, GDPR).



Why Join Us

	•	Work in a fast-paced, high-impact sector where marketing, technology, and law intersect.

	•	Opportunity to progress within the organisation as we expand globally.

	•	Flexible, remote-first culture with part-time hours and room to grow.



********************



How to Apply



Please send your CV and a short note explaining why this role suits you here: 
/4fh71Yt



- Include your CV as a PDF

- Add a covering message explaining why you are a great fit

- For bonus points - optionally include a 1-minute Loom video introducing yourself



***** Please follow these instructions, or your application will automatically not progress *****



********************



PLEASE NOTE: REFERENCES



We always take references on every new tea
mber before they join the team, so only apply if you can provide up to three professional references. No exceptions will be made. Thank you for understanding.



********************



We are excited to speak with you soon.



Thank you!

title: Shopify Fashion Product Lister (A player only!)
description: We are a serious Shopify general fashion dropshipping brand looking for a high-level, experienced Product Lister who fully understands product structure, pricing strategy, sizing logic, and market positioning. This is not an entry-level role. If you have only basic listing experience, do not apply. Your responsibility is to professionally list products inside Shopify, structure variants correctly (sizes, colors, options), add and properly format size charts, adjust pricing based on supplier quotations and margins, and ensure all product data is accurate at all times. You must understand international fashion markets and know which sizes are suitable for which countries, how to avoid sizing mistakes, and how to prevent costly listing errors. You will request quotations from suppliers daily, especially for products we are actively selling, monitor cost changes, update prices immediately when supplier pricing changes, and maintain healthy margins. If suppliers update stock, sizes, pricing, or shipping details, you are responsible for reflecting those changes in the store without being reminded. You are expected to think proactively, prevent mistakes before they happen, and maintain strict operational accuracy. Sloppy work, missed details, and slow responses are not acceptable. This is a full-time, long-term role for someone who takes ownership and operates at a high level without supervision. IMPORTANT: To confirm you read this job post carefully, write this word in the first line of your application: ORANGE. Applications without this word will be ignored automatically. Also include your Shopify experience, examples of stores you have worked with, and the exact tasks you handled in those stores. NOTE: I am only hiring an A-player Product Lister with proven high-level experience in fashion dropshipping; if you are not confident in your skills, attention to detail, and decision-making ability, do not apply.

title: Senior Property Management Bookkeeper or Accounting Lead
description:
Job Title: Senior Property Management Bookkeeper or Accounting Lead

Location: Remote

Schedule: Full-Time

Company: US-Based Property Management Company



— IMPORTANT: READ BEFORE APPLYING



- This role is NOT for entry-level bookkeepers or accounting assistants.

- If your experience is mostly administrative, operational, or data entry, this role will not be a fit.

- We are specifically looking for a senior-level accountant or bookkeeper who can:



~ Own property management accounting end-to-end

~ Supervise or review other bookkeepers

~ Enforce controls, accuracy, and compliance

~ Operate confidently inside AppFolio



— About the Role



We are a growing US-based property management company managing a mixed portfolio of long-term and short-term vacation rental properties. We are seeking a Senior Bookkeeper or Accounting Lead who can serve as the accounting authority for our portfolio.



This role goes beyond posting transactions. You will be responsible for:



- Ensuring trust accounting integrity

- Reviewing and approving work done by others

- Producing clean, defensible owner statements

- Acting as a bridge between operations and accounting



— Key Responsibilities



- Own full-cycle property management bookkeeping within AppFolio

- Perform and review:



~ Bank and trust account reconciliations

~ Owner statements

~ Owner disbursements and contributions



- Ensure strict compliance with trust accounting rules (no commingling, no forced balances)

- Review invoices, coding, and postings done by junior staff

- Identify and correct accounting issues before owner statements are released

- Coordinate with operations while protecting accounting integrity

- Support month-end and year-end close

- Prepare clean records and documentation for CPAs and audits

- Recommend and enforce accounting best practices and controls



— Required Qualifications (Non-Negotiable)



- Strong accounting or bookkeeping background senior level

- Demonstrated experience with:



~ Reconciliations

~ Journal entries

~ Month-end close



- Property management accounting experience:



~ Owner statements

~ Trust vs operating accounts

~ Property-level ledgers



- Ability to work independently and confidently with minimal supervision

- Willingness to push back on operations when accounting rules are at risk

- Excellent verbal and written communication and documentation skills



— Strongly Preferred (High Priority)



- Hands-on AppFolio experience

- CPA, Accounting degree, or equivalent senior-level accounting background

- Experience supervising or reviewing other bookkeepers

- Experience with US-based property management companies

- Background in QuickBooks, Xero, or similar systems in addition to AppFolio



— This Role Is NOT For



- Entry-level bookkeepers

- Accounting assistants

- Candidates whose experience is mainly:



~ Maintenance coordination

~ Leasing

~ General admin



- Anyone uncomfortable with accountability, controls, or decision-making



— Tools We Use



- AppFolio

- Guesty for short term vacation rental properties

- Google Workspace



— Compensation and Growth



- This role will begin with a probationary period at a conservative starting rate, reflecting the complexity and risk sensitivity of US property management trust accounting

- The probationary period allows both parties to confirm:



~ Alignment with our systems particularly AppFolio

~ Accuracy under real-world operational conditions

~ Ability to exercise independent judgment and uphold accounting controls



- Compensation will be reviewed and adjusted upon successful completion of the probationary period, based on demonstrated performance, reliability, and leadership capability

- Fully remote, long-term role for the right candidate

- Clear growth path into:



~ Accounting Supervisor

~ Property Management Accounting Manager



- Direct exposure to leadership, decision-making, and portfolio-level responsibility



— How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



Please include:



- Your resume

- A short cover letter answering both questions below:



1. What part of property management accounting have you personally owned end-to-end?

2. What accounting decisions have you made independently and not just followed instructions?



Applications that do not answer these questions may not be reviewed.



— Final Note



We are intentionally setting a high bar. We are looking for someone who can lead, review, and protect our accounting—not just process transactions.

title: Creative Project Manager & Design Operations VA
description:
Role Overview

This role exists to own the front line of client communication and creative operations, so Blake is no longer fielding constant messages, prioritization questions, or timeline pressure.

The person in this role will act as the intake manager, scheduler, and expectation-setter for all client requests, while also serving as a detail-oriented creative reviewer and backup designer when needed.

Their primary job is to receive requests, acknowledge them quickly, set realistic timelines, prioritize work appropriately, and ensure delivery happens smoothly without Blake needing to be involved in every step.



Core Responsibilities

Client Intake, Response & Expectation Management (Critical)

Monitor inbound client requests across
 and other channels

Ensure every client request receives a timely response, even if work cannot start immediately

Acknowledge receipt of requests with clear, calm, professional messaging such as:

“Thanks for sending this over, I’ve got it in the queue”

“We’re targeting delivery by Friday”

“I’ll follow up if we need anything else”

Set realistic turnaround times based on workload, complexity, and priority

Manage urgent requests without letting everything become “urgent”

Push back diplomatically when timelines are unrealistic

Proactively update clients if timelines shift

Reduce client anxiety by making sure no message goes unanswered

This person effectively buffers the client from urgency, pressure, and constant context switching.



Work Prioritization & Scheduling

Evaluate incoming requests and determine:

Urgency vs importance

Retainer work vs project work

Simple edit vs complex revision

Prioritize tasks appropriately across multiple clients

Schedule work in ClickUp based on real capacity, not client pressure

Balance deadlines so designers can work efficiently without fire drills

Flag overload or conflicts early and propose solutions



Creative Project Management

Translate client requests into clear, fully scoped ClickUp tasks



Ensure every task includes:

Complete instructions and context

Correct files, links, and Drive folders

Client history and scope notes

Due dates that match communicated timelines

Assign work to the client or the primary graphic designer

Track progress and follow up internally as needed

Edit Intake, Translation & Handoff

Receive and interpret client edit notes, including multi-point and detailed feedback

Clarify vague or confusing requests before work begins



D
 whether edits should be:

Completed directly

Handed off to the primary designer

Translate client language into clear, actionable design instructions

Verify all requested changes were executed correctly before delivery

Design QA & Review

Review all creative work before it goes to the client



Check for:

Spelling and copy accuracy

Alignment, spacing, centering, and pixel-level precision

Image resolution and export quality

Basic design and brand consistency

Catch issues early to reduce rework and client revisions

Act as the final internal checkpoint before delivery

Backup Graphic Design Support

Handle small or urgent edits when appropriate

Make minor design adjustments such as:

Pixel shifts

title: Sr. Customer Service (5+ Years Experience) – D2C Customer Service Operations (Shopify Expert)
description:
Please apply if you have experience more than 5 years.



Company: KIM.CC



Job Type: Full-Time | Remote (Work from Home)



About KIM.CC



KIM.CC is a global operations and customer experience partner supporting fast-growing Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) eCommerce brands. We specialize in building structured, scalable customer support operations that help brands deliver exceptional customer experiences while maintaining operational efficiency.

Our team works closely with international Shopify brands, helping them scale through strong processes, documentation, and performance-driven support systems. We are looking for a Lead Agent who can take ownership of client operations and help build systems that scale, not just manage daily tickets.



About the Role



This is a senior individual contributor role, not a traditional team lead position. As a Lead Agent, you will own assigned D2C client accounts end-to-end, ensuring operations are structured, documented, and consistently performing at a high level.

You will act as the operational backbone for client accounts by building SOPs, improving workflows, enabling agents through knowledge systems, and ensuring smooth day-to-day support performance. This role is ideal for someone who thinks in processes and systems, enjoys creating structure, takes accountability for outcomes, and thrives in fast-moving eCommerce environments.



Key Responsibilities



Account Ownership & Process Excellence

Fully own operational workflows for assigned Shopify D2C accounts





Create and maintain complete SOP documentation across all processes





Ensure zero dependency on undocumented knowledge





Update SOPs within 48 hours of operational changes





Identify operational gaps and implement improvements





Training & Knowledge System Development

Build structured training manuals for each client account





Create case scenario libraries and workflow references





Document edge cases, exception handling, and escalation logic





Enable agents to independently resolve the majority of support tickets





Shopify D2C Operations Management

Manage order workflows, refunds, and exchanges





Handle RTO and COD processes





Support subscription management and payment issue resolution





Coordinate with shipping and logistics teams





Manage helpdesk platforms such as Gorgias, Zendesk, or Freshdesk





Operational Monitoring & Reporting

Monitor ticket volumes and workload patterns





Anticipate operational risks and peak volumes





Share daily and weekly performance insights





Recommend proactive operational improvements





Business Continuity Support

Step in during agent absences when required





Maintain uninterrupted support coverage





Ensure consistent service quality during staffing gaps





Required Experience

5–7 years of experience in Customer Support or D2C Operations





Strong hands-on Shopify experience (required)





Experience managing D2C workflows including returns, COD, RTO, and subscriptions





Familiarity with helpdesk platforms such as Gorgias, Zendesk, or Freshdesk





Proven experience creating SOPs and operational documentation





Strong analytical and organizational skills





Excellent written English communication skills





Ideal Candidate Profile

You think in scalable systems rather than individual tickets and are highly organized with strong documentation habits. You take ownership without needing constant supervision, proactively identify risks, and are confident working with international teams and clients. You enjoy continuously improving processes and building structure within operations.

title: HIRING ASAP! Google Media Buyer (eCommerce)
description:
Help scale brands. Own performance. Drive real revenue.



GTE is a fast-growing global eCommerce company where great ideas don’t sit in slides — they turn into real, measurable growth. We build and scale online brands across international markets, and our tea
mbers take real ownership, grow fast, and help shape the future of the company.



We’re now looking for a performance-driven Google Ads Media Buyer to help take our main revenue channel to the next level.



Why This Role Matters



Google Ads drives around 90% of our total company revenue. That means your work won’t just “support marketing”, it will directly influence the growth of the entire business.



This role is perfect for someone who loves improving systems, scaling performance, and turning data into smarter decisions. You won’t just manage campaigns, you’ll help evolve the way we run Google Ads.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

From day one, you’ll have real ownership. Within your first 90 days, success in this role will mean:

- Developing and rolling out a new or significantly improved Google Ads strategy

- Restructuring and optimizing Google Shopping campaigns for stronger scalability and efficiency

- Driving measurable performance improvements, targeting a 20%+ increase in revenue from Google Ads

- Using performance data to continuously refine bidding strategies, campaign structure, and product feed performance

- Your goal is simple: turn ad spend into scalable, profitable growth.



We’re excited to work with someone who:

- Has at least 3 years of hands-on experience in performance marketing or media buying

- Has direct experience running Google Shopping campaigns for large eCommerce catalogs (10,000+ products)

- Has managed high-budget ad accounts ($300K+ per month)

- Is highly proficient in Google Ads, Google Merchant Center, and Google Analytics

- Ideally has experience with Google CSS Labelizer

- Thinks analytically and uses data to drive decisions, not guesswork

- Enjoys testing, optimizing, and uncovering performance opportunities others might miss

- Is comfortable taking full ownership of results and being accountable for revenue impact



Hiring Process

As part of our process, shortlisted candidates will complete a 19-minute Google Ads knowledge assessment. This helps us understand your hands-on expertise before moving forward to the HR interview stage.

title: NetSuite Accountant
description:
About Us



Welcome to Assign – where global talent thrives! We connect exceptional professionals like you with leading U.S. businesses, enabling you to showcase your skills on an international stage.



At Assign, we believe in fostering an environment where talent can grow and flourish. We're committed to inclusivity, personal and professional growth, and we aim for service excellence in everything we do.



By joining our network, you will be a part of a vibrant community shaping the future of work, transcending borders, and transforming businesses. Be a part of our journey as we shape the future of work!



Hours: Full-Time, 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM PST, with potential schedule adjustments after the initial few months based on business needs and team alignment.



Job Description

As the NetSuite Accountant, you will play a key role in supporting corporate and parent company accounting across a growing, multi-entity organization. This position is ideal for an accountant with a strong general ledger foundation who enjoys working in dynamic environments, supporting month-end close, and contributing to process improvements as the business scales.



This role goes beyond transactional accounting and provides exposure to intercompany activity, financial reporting, revenue-related accounting, and new initiatives. You will work closely with the Corporate Controller and cross-functional teams to ensure accurate financial reporting while helping build and improve accounting processes.



Key Responsibilities

Core Accounting & Month-End Close

Prepare journal entries ranging from routine to complex, including accruals, payroll, depreciation, prepaids, and other recurring and non-recurring entries.

Support and own assigned areas of the monthly close process, ensuring accuracy and timeliness.

Prepare and review monthly balance sheet reconciliations and supporting schedules with a strong understanding of underlying activity.

Assist in continuously improving and streamlining the month-end close process in partnership with the Controller.



Accounts Payable, Credit Cards & Cash

Review and reconcile accounts payable, credit card transactions, and employee reimbursements from the AP system (e.g., RAMP).

Prepare bank reconciliations with varying levels of volume and complexity.



Intercompany & Multi-Entity Accounting

Prepare and review intercompany transactions, funding flows, and eliminations across multiple entities.

Support accounting across operating companies, holding entities, and related structures to ensure accurate financial reporting.



Revenue, New Initiatives & Special Projects

Support revenue-related accounting, including management fees and other revenue streams, as applicable.

Assist with accounting for new business lines, products, or initiatives by researching and documenting appropriate accounting treatment under U.S. GAAP.

Participate in special projects and new initiatives, providing accounting support and insight as the business evolves.



Financial Reporting & Analysis

Assist with the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and year-end financial statements.

Prepare variance analysis and provide commentary on balance sheet and P&L fluctuations versus prior periods and budget.



Controls, Systems & Process Improvement

Assist in developing, documenting, and maintaining standard operating procedures (SOPs) for assigned accounting areas.

Identify opportunities to improve processes, controls, and automation to enhance accuracy and efficiency.

Work within NetSuite and integrated systems to support clean, scalable, and auditable accounting processes.



Collaboration & Audit Support

Collaborate with FP&A, Legal, Operations, and other cross-functional teams to understand transactions end-to-end.

Communicate effectively with stakeholders, including non-accounting partners.

Assist with audits, reviews, and other external reporting requests as needed.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

Relevant accounting experience supporting corporate accounting and month-end close (level will align with experience).

Strong understanding of the U.S. GAAP and general ledger accounting.

Experience in a multi-entity environment is preferred.

Proficiency in Excel; experience with NetSuite is strongly required.

Real estate, investment, or fund-related experience is a plus but not required.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with high attention to detail.

Ability to prioritize tasks, meet deadlines, and adapt in a fast-paced, evolving environment.

Self-motivated, collaborative, and comfortable taking ownership of assigned areas.



What We Offer:

PTOs

Paid US holiday leaves

Opportunity for growth and professional development.

Collaborative and supportive work environment.



How to Apply: Interested applicants should apply using this link: 
/
/f/dp7a
/KN6OJKJT4WHTP193CN



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview. Applications will be accepted until the role is filled.

title: Systems Architect – Founder Operating System
description:
Luxure Lifestyle



Luxure Lifestyle is a high-touch lifestyle and executive support brand entering a structural growth phase. We are building long-term operational infrastructure designed to protect executive focus and support scale.



We are hiring a Systems Architect to architect and personally build our founder-first operating system from the ground up.



This is not an automation oversight role.

This is not a strategy-only position.



This is hands-on architectural infrastructure leadership.



You will design and directly configure the centralized system that governs execution, reporting, initiative visibility, performance tracking, and approval control across the organization. This includes personally building the relational databases, permissions, automations, dashboards, and governance safeguards required for scale.



The mandate is to reduce executive cognitive load without compromising structural integrity or oversight.



If you think in systems — and you build them yourself — continue reading.

What You Will Build



You will architect and deploy:



Founder Operating System (Notion-Based Core)



A relational database ecosystem (Tasks, Meetings, KPIs, Hiring, Initiatives, SOP Library)



Clean schema logic with structured permissions



Interconnected data architecture that eliminates workflow fragmentation



A system designed to remain stable under scale



Controlled Intake & Routing Infrastructure



Centralized intake across Gmail, Slack, and meeting outputs



Structured review pipelines with clear approval gating



Deduplication safeguards and escalation controls



Automation frameworks that support oversight — never bypass it



Executive Visibility & Performance Systems



Real-time KPI dashboards tied to measurable outcomes



Initiative tracking linked to strategic priorities



Structured reporting views that eliminate manual status chasing



Automation monitoring logs with audit visibility



Governance & Documentation



Defined decision pathways and escalation logic



System documentation built for non-technical adoption



Infrastructure that is usable, enforceable, and resilient



This role requires architectural thinking, not tool familiarity.





ENGAGEMENT STRUCTURE



This begins with a 90-day observation and build period.



Within this timeframe, you will be expected to deliver full operating system deployment and conduct an executive walkthrough. Continued long-term engagement will be based on system integrity, clarity, and alignment.





This Role Is Not For You If



You primarily build one-off automations



You require constant direction to design structure



You optimize tools without understanding governance



You focus on speed over architectural durability





This Role Is For You If



You have 3–5+ years advanced experience with Zapier or Make



You have deep Notion relational database architecture expertise



You have built executive dashboards and KPI frameworks



You think in systems, dependencies, and structural integrity



You design for scale, not short-term convenience



You are comfortable operating within executive governance structures





Application Requirements (Required)



A link to your resume



A video recording (maximum 3 minutes) answering:



Describe a full operating system you architected (not just automations). What structural problem did it solve?



How do you document systems so non-technical teams can execute confidently?



Why do you want to build infrastructure for Luxure Lifestyle?



Applications without both submissions will not be reviewed.

title: Follow-Up Manager
description:
Cash Now Philly closes over 100 deals a year across Pennsylvania, New Jersey, Delaware, and Maryland. We're not a startup figuring things out — we're a proven operation looking for two Follow-Up Managers to join our acquisitions team.

This role is all about lead reactivation. You'll be working through our CRM database of homeowners, identifying motivation, and setting up quality conversations for our acquisition reps. If you're comfortable in high-volume phone environments and know how to turn a "not interested" into a real conversation, this could be a great fit.



What the job looks like day-to-day:

Working in a predictive dialer (Salesforce, Zen Call) making hundreds of calls per day

Reactivating aged leads and identifying homeowners who are actually motivated to sell

Handling objections and keeping conversations moving forward

Logging detailed notes and dispositions in the CRM

Handing off real opportunities to our acquisition team with solid context



Who we're looking for:

At least 2 years of cold calling or outbound sales experience

Clear English communication — you'll be talking to homeowners across the US

Someone who can sit in a dialer queue all day and stay sharp

You listen more than you talk and know how to find motivation without being pushy

Real estate experience is a plus but not required — we'll train the right person



What we offer:

$5/hour base pay

Full-time, Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 7 PM Eastern

Fully remote

Training from a team that actually closes deals

A tight ship without micromanagement — show up, do the work, get better every day



How to apply:

We take hiring seriously. Expect a questionnaire, an assessment, and an interview. Don't copy/paste some generic application — we read every one. Include the code word "reactivate" somewhere in your submission.

If you're ready to work with a real team that performs, apply now.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 2a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 


/cro-shopify-web-developer/



CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required.

title: Revit Modeller (MEP/Irrigation)
description:
We are seeking a skilled and experienced Revit Modeler with a primary focus on irrigation systems. The ideal candidate will have a minimum of 3 years of experience, preferably with a background in irrigation design. While MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing) experience is acceptable, a strong emphasis on irrigation-related projects is desired.



Responsibilities:



Revit Modeling:



-Develop detailed Revit models for irrigation systems, ensuring accuracy and compliance with project specifications.

Collaborate with project teams to integrate irrigation designs into overall building models.

Irrigation System Design:

-Utilize your expertise in irrigation to contribute to the design and planning of irrigation systems for various projects.

Work closely with engineers and landscape architects to implement efficient and sustainable irrigation solutions.



Collaboration:

-Engage in effective communication with interdisciplinary teams to coordinate irrigation designs with overall building systems.

Collaborate with project managers, architects, and other stakeholders to meet project goals and deadlines.



Quality Assurance:

-Conduct thorough reviews of Revit models to ensure accuracy, consistency, and compliance with industry standards.

Identify and resolve any conflicts or issues that may arise during the modeling process.

Qualifications:



Education:

-Bachelor's degree in a relevant field (e.g., Civil Engineering, Landscape Architecture) is preferred.



Experience:

- Minimum of 3 years of professional experience in Revit modeling, with a focus on irrigation systems.

MEP experience is acceptable, but a strong preference for candidates with significant exposure to irrigation projects.



Technical Skills:

- Proficiency in Autodesk Revit is mandatory.

-Familiarity with relevant software tools for irrigation design is a plus.

-Problem-Solving:

-Demonstrated ability to identify and solve problems related to irrigation system design and modeling.



Communication:

-Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written, to effectively convey design ideas and collaborate with diverse project teams.



Adaptability:

-Ability to adapt to changing project requirements and deadlines.



How to Apply:



Interested candidates are invited to submit their resumes and portfolios showcasing relevant irrigation and Revit modeling projects to 
 include a cover letter highlighting your specific experience in irrigation design and Revit modeling.

title: Personal Executive Assistant 8 fig+ entrepreneur (NEW JOB)
description:
If you've already applied, please re-apply because something went wrong with our previous form. 



We're hiring a Personal Executive Assistant for a multi-brand ecom founder based in Dubai.

We DON'T consider you if you send an AI response!



Details: Remote, full-time (100% reliable person)

• Long-term role that grows with the business



I'm an entrepreneur running multiple e-commerce brands. I'm based in Dubai, travel frequently between Europe and the Middle East, and manage several business entities.



I need one exceptional person to take everything off my plate that isn't high-level strategy or creative direction. If you're the type of person who figures things out before being asked, keep reading.



What you'll do:

• Book all flights, hotels, and transportation, research the best options, know my preferences, and handle everything from departure times to visa requirements without me having to think about it

• Manage my calendar across multiple time zones, schedule meetings, block focus time, flag conflicts, and never let anything fall through the cracks

• Think 3 months ahead at all times, track deadlines, renewals, visa expirations, lease end dates, upcoming trips, and send me weekly briefings so I'm never surprised

• Manage communications with brokers, accountants, service providers, and legal contacts, draft
s, follow up, keep everything moving

• Handle admin for a secondary business (small e-commerce site), product updates, supplier coordination, small operational tasks

• Handle personal logistics, SIM registrations, bank appointments, sourcing purchases, coordinating local services in Dubai • Manage my inbox when needed, flag urgent items, draft responses, archive noise



What I'm looking for:

• Highly intelligent and resourceful, you figure things out on your own before escalating (if not we won't work with you!)

• Obsessively punctual and detail-oriented, you triple-check dates, times, and details because mistakes cost real money (if not we won't work with you!)

• Direct communicator, no fluff, no sugarcoating, you say what needs to be said clearly and immediately (if not we won't work with you!)

• Proactive and forward-thinking, you anticipate what's needed before being asked

• Exceptional written and spoken English (if not we won't work with you!)

• 2+ years experience as an EA, PA, or Chief of Staff, ideally for a founder, CEO, or HNW individual (if not we won't work with you!)

• Expert in Google Workspace, Slack, and project management tools (if not we won't work with you!)

• Trustworthy and discreet, you'll have access to sensitive business and personal information



After 30 days, I should never have to:

• Book my own flights or accommodation

• Chase anyone for a response

• Remember a deadline or renewal

• Research options for a decision, you present them ready for approval

title: FibreMax Account Manager, technical first, remote full time, AWST.
description:
Role overview.

FibreMax supports Australian small businesses with cloud phone systems and business internet. We are hiring a technically strong account manager who can troubleshoot VoIP and NBN issues, build clean solutions, and then grow into higher volume quoting, renewals, and account expansion. If you enjoy solving real problems, explaining things clearly, and taking ownership end to end, this role is for you.



What you will do.



1. Take inbound leads and support requests, respond fast, qualify the need, then drive the issue or opportunity through to completion.

2. Design and configure VoIP solutions, SIP trunks, DIDs, extensions, call flows, IVR menus, ring groups, call queues, after hours routing, voi
 to
, call recording.

3. Provision and support handsets and networks, including common IP phone and router setups, remote troubleshooting, and clear customer instructions.

4. Support Australian number porting and carrier processes, collect the right info, manage timelines, and keep customers updated.

5. Support NBN related onboarding and troubleshooting, interpret service details, guide customers on modem router and NTD setup, and coordinate escalations with upstream suppliers.

6. Maintain accurate notes in CRM and ticketing, create repeatable checklists, and improve internal documentation as you learn.



Technical requirements, must have.



1. Strong VoIP knowledge, SIP registration, RTP audio, NAT traversal, codecs, DTMF methods, common one way audio causes, and how to test and isolate faults.

2. Solid networking fundamentals, IP addressing, DHCP, DNS, VLAN concepts, QoS concepts, WiFi basics, and practical router troubleshooting using tools like ping, traceroute, and packet capture where needed.

3. Experience supporting business telecom services, ideally with Australian market exposure, including landline numbers, porting, and carrier style fault handling.

4. Familiarity with NBN concepts and common access types, FTTP, FTTN, FTTC, HFC, Fixed Wireless, and typical customer side components like NTD and router configuration.

5. Strong written and spoken English, you can write step by step instructions that a non technical business owner can follow.

6. Reliable remote work setup, stable internet, a quiet workspace, and a quality headset.



Great to have.



1. Experience with Australian RSP workflows, NBN portals, service classes, AVC CVC concepts, UNI D, and typical escalation evidence requirements.

2. Experience with common SME equipment, Grandstream, Yealink, DrayTek, UniFi, Mikrotik.

3. Experience with PBX platforms, VitalPBX, Asterisk based systems, or similar.



How success is measured.



1. Speed to first contact and speed to resolution.

2. First time right provisioning and low rework.

3. Clear customer communication and strong satisfaction.

4. Clean CRM and ticket notes that make handover easy.

5. Growing accounts through great outcomes, referrals, upgrades, and add ons.



How to apply.

Send your resume and a short cover note that includes.



1. Your VoIP and networking experience and the platforms you have worked with.

2. One example of a tricky VoIP issue you solved and how you diagnosed it.

3. Your NBN experience level and what access types you have supported.

4. Confirmation you can work aligned to AWST and your availability to start.

title: Freelance Designer for AI-Based 3D LED Sign Mockups and Vector Production
description:
We are looking for a reliable freelance designer to support us in creating AI-assisted 3D LED sign concepts for storefronts.

Your main responsibilities will include:

– Designing custom 3D LED signs using AI tools and your own design expertise

– Rendering or realistically compositing the designed sign onto a provided exterior photo of a storefront (mockup/Photoshop integration)

– Creating a final vector file of the approved sign design

– Adding exact measurements and dimensions to the vector graphic for production purposes

The goal is to provide our clients with a realistic visual preview of how their new LED sign could look on their actual building.



Workflow:

We provide you with: – A storefront photo

– Design brief and specifications

You deliver: – A realistic rendered mockup placed on the storefront

– A production-ready vector file with accurate dimensions



Trial Task:

Before starting long-term collaboration, we require a test task.

We will provide a sample design brief and expect you to execute one complete mockup and vector file so we can evaluate quality and attention to detail.



Compensation:

– $7 per completed project (including mockup and vector file)



Requirements:

– Experience with AI-assisted design tools

– Strong skills in Photoshop (or equivalent) for realistic compositing

– Ability to create clean, production-ready vector files (Illustrator or similar)

– Attention to detail, especially with proportions and measurements

– Reliable communication and timely delivery



We are looking for a long-term collaboration if the quality and communication are consistent.

title: Executive Operations Associate
description:
Hiring Filipino and Philippine-based professionals only!



Wingz, is a leading US rideshare company focused on Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT). 

Visit our website: 



Position: Executive Operations Associate

Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, (ET, US Hours)

Employment Set-up: Remote (Independent Contractor)

Salary Range: Starts at USD 1,500 - 2,000/ Month

Pay-out Frequency: Semi-Monthly

Benefits: Unlimited PTO and HMO after the probationary period

Equipment: Self-Provided



Job Summary:



Wingz is seeking a proactive, organized, and highly analytical Executive Operations Associate to support our executive team and contribute to critical operational and cross-functional initiatives.

This role is ideal for someone who can balance executive assistance, business operations, and project coordination—ensuring leaders are supported while helping drive business efficiency and growth.

You will work closely with the CEO, leadership team, and various departments to assist in planning, communication, reporting, operational strategy, and execution.



Key Responsibilities:



Executive Support

• Manage executive calendars, schedules, and meeting coordination.

• Prepare reports, research summaries, and presentation materials for leadership.

• Handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism.



Business Operations

• Support cross-functional operational tasks across Operations, Support, Engineering, Compliance, and Finance.

• Track and monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) and operational metrics.

• Assist in documenting workflows, SOPs, and process improvements.

• Conduct data analysis and generate insights to support decision-making.



Project Coordination

• Coordinate projects across teams, ensuring timelines, deliverables, and follow-ups are met.

• Facilitate communication between departments to keep initiatives on track.

• Support the rollout of new processes, tools, or business strategies.



Communication & Collaboration

• Prepare clear, organized summaries, reports, and client-facing materials.

• Serve as an internal point of coordination for executives and cross-functional teams.

• Ensure alignment, follow-through, and accountability across stakeholders.



Requirements:

• Minimum of 2 years of experience in executive assistance, business operations, project coordination, or other relevant roles.

• Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

• High analytical capability with experience using Google Sheets/Excel (formulas, data organization, reporting).

• Ability to work independently and handle tasks with minimal supervision.

• Demonstrated experience managing projects or coordinating cross-team activities.

• Strong attention to detail and ability to prioritize effectively.

• Comfortable working US hours (ET).



Preferred Skills

• Experience in NEMT, healthcare, logistics, transportation, or SaaS (a plus, not required).

• Experience with productivity or project management tools (Notion, Trello, Asana, ClickUp, etc.).

• Strong presentation-building skills (Slides, PowerPoint).

• Background in data analysis, reporting, or business strategy support.

title: Medical Doctor Needed For Report Writing

I will give top candidates a sample case and candidate will have to provide a report proving that they are capable. Selected candidates will get paid for writing the sample case/report.

title: Administrative Operations Assistant
description:
Her Mane Therapy is a structured, systems-driven luxury healthy hair salon brand based in Texas. We operate with clear processes, measurable KPIs, and high standards for client experience.



We are hiring a high-level Administrative Operations Assistant who can think critically, manage systems independently, and protect the structure of the business.



This is not a basic VA role.



This is for someone who enjoys building order, improving workflows, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.



?



Who This Role Is For



You are:



• Naturally organized and detail-oriented

• Confident managing project management systems

• Comfortable making decisions without constant supervision

• Warm and professional in client communication

• Proactive — you fix problems before they escalate

• Calm under pressure

• Not intimidated by structure, KPIs, or accountability



You enjoy being the person who keeps the engine running smoothly.



?



Primary Responsibilities



Operations & Systems Management



• Manage and maintain Asana workflows

• Ensure all tasks are assigned, tracked, and completed

• Build and refine SOPs inside Asana

• Monitor automation flows and flag breakdowns

• Track KPIs weekly and report insights

• Maintain organized Google Drive folders



You must have real experience in Asana.

If you do not have Asana experience, you must demonstrate your ability to learn and build within it before interview.



?



Client Experience Support



• Follow up on incomplete intake forms

• Manage waitlist communication

• Support membership audits inside booking system

• Send structured follow-up messages

• Light inbox and SMS support as needed



Client communication must feel polished, warm, and confident.



?



Experience Required



• Minimum 2–3 years in administrative or operations support

• Proven experience using Asana (not just Trello)

• Experience with CRM or booking systems

• Strong written English

• Experience working with US-based clients preferred

• Comfortable recording Loom videos and communicating clearly



?



How to Apply



To be considered, submit:

 1. A short Loom video (3–5 minutes) walking through an Asana board you have built.

 2. A brief explanation of how you improved a workflow in a previous role.

 3. Your availability in CST time zone.



Applications without Loom submission will not be reviewed.



?



Growth Opportunity



This role has long-term potential to evolve into:



• Operations Manager

• Client Experience Lead

• Systems Director



We value loyalty, excellence, and initiative. High performers grow here.
